programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Assignment of the Year
programme.desc: While Antonio continues his off-duty security job for Asher and Layla, Asher is killed. Voight works the case while making sure Antonio is covered and Halstead and Lindsay go undercover in a rather uncomfortable location.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Called in Dead

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Shouldn't Have Been Alone

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore
programme.desc: Lindsay has her first case with the task force and realizes she needs to call on Voight and her Intelligence Unit to assist. Meanwhile, Burgess is back at work and delegated to desk duty, allowing Platt to partner up with Roman.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: My Way

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Weigh Station

programme.title: Movie: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: The world is astounded when a reclusive candy manufacturer randomly places golden tickets inside chocolate bar wrappers, which will allow five lucky people to tour his unusual factory.

programme.title: Movie: Cars
programme.desc: A cocky young race car burns rubber to California to compete in the Piston Cup Championship, until the residents of Radiator Springs teach him to slow his roll and appreciate friends and family.

programme.title: Movie: Cars 2
programme.desc: A racecar and his friend travel across the sea to compete in the World Grand Prix race. Their voyage changes course however, when his friend decides to get involved in a different type of adventure completely: becoming an international spy.

programme.title: Movie: Cars 3
programme.desc: After he's forced out of a race by a speedy new generation of cars, champion racer Lightning McQueen rehabilitates himself in anticipation of a rematch. He'll never be able to match their speed, but his years of racing experience may be enough to win.

programme.title: Movie: Rampage
programme.desc: A primatologist has a closer bond with George, a friendly gorilla that he's raised since infanthood, than he does with any humans, but when the animal is exposed to a genetic experiment it grows to a massive size and goes on a destructive rampage.

programme.title: Movie: Godzilla
programme.desc: The 'world's most famous monster' is pitted against new and deadly creatures that threaten mankind's very existence. With humanity’s scientific tampering and arrogance having offset the balance of nature, Godzilla has awoken once again to regain it.

programme.title: Movie: The Meg
programme.desc: After a research vessel is attacked, a prehistoric shark that was believed to be long-since extinct is found living in the ocean's deepest depths, and as it emerges to shallower waters a rescue diver who encountered it years prior must stop it.

programme.title: Movie: Rampage
programme.desc: A primatologist has a closer bond with George, a friendly gorilla that he's raised since infanthood, than he does with any humans, but when the animal is exposed to a genetic experiment it grows to a massive size and goes on a destructive rampage.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Mind Games

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Assassination of Dwayne Pride
programme.desc: A journalist posts a scathing article about Pride's reckless behaviour and the team becomes worried about the fallout of the article and confidential information contained therein.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Breaking Brig
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the crash of an armoured transport bus carrying Naval brig detainees after four prisoners escape, including a black market broker who is one of the country's biggest security threats. Meanwhile, Pride turns to Gibbs for help.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Recruits
programme.desc: After a Navy SEAL is found murdered in a sorority house, the team must determine if the motive pertained to one of his classified missions or collegiate foul play. Meanwhile, Pride's daughter, Laurel, pays the NCIS office a visit.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: It Happened Last Night
programme.desc: The team is given a 22-hour deadline after the murder investigation of a Chief Warrant Officer who specialized in counterintelligence reveals his wife had been kidnapped and is being held for ransom.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Master of Horror
programme.desc: With New Orleans decorated for Halloween, the team investigates the murder of a naval staff Judge Advocate found in a cemetery dressed in a Victorian costume with vampiric puncture wounds on her neck. Meanwhile, the team debates Halloween night activity.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Watch Over Me
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a navy officer with the highest level top secret clearance who was recently assigned as a tech liaison with a private developer. Also, Pride transforms the carport into an auto shop.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Love Hurts
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a petty officer found in a Mardi Gras float storage facility with an engagement ring and proposal plan in hand. However, the case takes a mysterious turn when the team is unable to locate his supposed girlfriend.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Chasing Ghosts
programme.desc: After a stolen navy-issued gun is found to belong to a Chief Petty officer who died 40 years ago, the team reopens the cold case, one that Wade has tracked and investigated for years. Also, the team prepares for their annual Thanksgiving dinner together.

programme.title: Movie: Pacific Rim

programme.desc: The manhunt for escaped prisoners Richard Matt and David Sweat was growing, expanding from the United States to Canada. Thousands of leads were being followed, but weeks into the search, there was still no sign of the missing men.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard

programme.title: Movie: Friday After Next
programme.desc: Two cousins move in together and work as nighttime security guards. Their house is robbed on Christmas Eve and they team up to track the criminal down.

programme.title: Movie: The Change-Up
programme.desc: Hilarity ensues when two wildly different men swap bodies and must then cope with their new lives.

programme.title: Movie: Knocked Up
programme.desc: When a fun-loving guy impregnates an up-and-coming entertainment journalist, they put their differences aside and take a shot at love.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: A Tuscan Feast: Joel McHale and Cheryl Hines
programme.desc: Lisa creates an al fresco Tuscan feast for two hilarious guests: Italian-born Joel McHale and actress Cheryl Hines. The day includes a mystery blindfold game, flaming cheese pasta, and Lisa confronting Joel about things he's said about her in the past.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: An Evening in Provence: Lance Bass and Vivica A. Fox
programme.desc: Lisa transports her best friend Lance Bass and actress Vivica A. Fox to the South of France with a Provence-themed party — and serial prankster Lance gets a taste of his own medicine.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fear the Unknown
programme.desc: Knowing her family's history with cancer, Kris wants the girls to take a genetic test to know their risks, but not everyone is on board. Meanwhile Kendall struggles to find a balance in her relationship with Caitlyn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Miscommunication
programme.desc: Kris decides the family needs 'Communication Therapy,' but her plans backfire when she misses one of the sessions. Kylie is finally ready to celebrate her new home but her family's bossy ways get in the way of her plans.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Great Kris
programme.desc: Follow the one-of-a-kind family as well as their group of celebrity pals.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family First
programme.desc: The girls recreate a legendary family video as part of Kris's epic 60th birthday bash. Meanwhile Khloé struggles to find a balance between supporting Lamar and returning to her daily life. Kendall worries that her family will get in the way of her dreams.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unforeseen Future
programme.desc: With her due date rapidly approaching and her baby breached, Kim learns that her house construction is delayed even further.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Beginnings and Endings
programme.desc: Khloe and Tristan run into some roadblocks in the process of expanding their family, Scott faces some big decisions about his relationship, and Kim prepares for a test that will determine her future as a lawyer.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Comment
programme.desc: When Scott accidentally causes some speculation that Khloe and Tristan are back together, Khloe is overwhelmed by the backlash online. The family worries that Kim is going through a difficult time and tries to cheer her up. Kendall has baby fever.

programme.title: Movie: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: Several young women and men, from committed relationships and singles, try to understand the signals and the intentions of the other sex. A variety of situations and misunderstandings develop the truth about dating in the modern world.

programme.title: Movie: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: Several young women and men, from committed relationships and singles, try to understand the signals and the intentions of the other sex. A variety of situations and misunderstandings develop the truth about dating in the modern world.

programme.title: Movie: Knocked Up

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: The Bracket Begins
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes the final 16 chefs into the Tournament of Champions arena and reveals the new and returning chefs' seeds and matchups.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' International
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbin' gangster global grub. In Houston, a Jamaican joint knocking it out of the park with their oxtail and curry goat. Plus, a Lebanese stop serving up mom's specialties like kibbie balls and kabobs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Inspiration
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits the road to meet chefs putting their roots into their menus. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' Louisiana specialties like blackened chicken pasta and a marrow butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Seafood and Shawarma
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's taking an eclectic, global-infused tour of Flavortown. In Minneapolis, an Italian spot carries on a fun, family pizza-making tradition, and in Miami, a champion chef cooks Haitian classics like griot, snapper and octopus.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Delicious Discoveries
programme.desc: Guy uncovers surprising culinary discoveries. In Columbus, Ohio, a hidden gem inside a grocery store serves Nepalese-Tibetan specialties. A Mexican spot in Dallas serves seafood tacos and mole fries and another Dallas joint makes dishes from Afghanistan.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom's Kitchen
programme.desc: Guy hits the road to grab grub straight from mom's kitchen. In Boulder, a mother and son team serve Chinese specialties, a Jamaican joint dishes out island favourites in Columbus and a Phoenix family spot cooks Latin cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East-West Flavorfest
programme.desc: Washington D.C. serves dumplings and ramen. Atlantic City has a pizza parlor with cheeseburger and chicken vodka pizza. Also, roast beef and cinnamon rolls in Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Latin Street Food
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taste buds are dancing as he digs into all kinds of Latin favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pork and Paprikash
programme.desc: Guy finds a diner spicing, roasting and smoking fresh pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grab and Grub
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into joints where you can literally grab all kinds of grub, starting with a Chicago-style spot in Tucson, Ariz., firing up deep-dish pie and twisted-up breadsticks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Goin' Big and Bringin' Home
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri combine cooking at home and great restaurant food with recipes sent by DDD alums who join in the fun via video chat. The menu includes a stromboli from Wyoming and seafood stew from a classic Georgia diner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Barbecued, Baked and Brined
programme.desc: Guy visits three joints doing scratch cooking their way.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bringing Comfort Home
programme.desc: On today's menu, there's gourmet grilled cheese from Nashville, primo pizza from Boulder, Colorado, Memphis fried chicken and Greek kebabs out of Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Only at This Joint
programme.desc: A BBQ place in Portland serving smoking trout and Oysters Rockefeller in Florida.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Seeing Double
programme.desc: Trisha celebrates her wax figure being inducted into Nashville's Madame Tussauds Wax Museum. The menu includes ingredients that are used in at least two ways, including Pork Tenderloin with Bacon Onion Jam and Apple Cider and Sautéed Apple Basmati rice.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Gal's Best Friend
programme.desc: To celebrate the adoption anniversary of her dog, Millie, Trisha Yearwood makes a healthy lunch with her friend, Lisa, before taking their dogs on a hike.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Celebrating 20 Years of Friendship
programme.desc: Valerie invites her three best friends over to celebrate two decades of friendship with hot spinach and crab dip, grilled eggplant parm, warm Brussels sprout salad, apricot Manhattans and a cream cheese cherry galette.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: All-American Boy
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli's close friend and fellow chef, Stuart O'Keeffe, recently became a US citizen, so she's treating him to her favorite all-American dishes. The patriotic menu includes red wine and herb-marinated tri-tip and twice-baked potatoes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Girls' Night In
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is hosting a girls' night at the lodge, complete with a tasty spread of canapes and cocktails. She makes citrus shrimp nachos and zucchini quinoa cakes with herbed yogurt.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Moving House
programme.desc: There's a new cowboy on the ranch, and Ree Drummond is making him dinner to-go and sharing the epic story of delivering his massive, ready-built house.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Vacation at Home
programme.desc: Ree Drummond goes global for delicious inspiration while staying cozy in her kitchen. She crosses the Atlantic for an all-in-one take on a Full English Breakfast and heads to North Africa for a Chicken Tagine. Dessert is a trio of Brazilian Brigadeiros.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Just for Two
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making recipes just for two. For sharing, there's a juicy Cajun t-bone steak with lemon pepper shoestring fries. She also makes a sheet pan dinner of spicy peanut chicken and broccoli, plus dulce de leche lava cakes.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Midwest Passover
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is celebrating day two of Passover on the farm with her super crispy giant skillet latke for lunch. For dinner, succulent spatchcock roast chicken is served with mouthwatering schmaltzy potatoes and green goddess sauce.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Spring Is Springing!
programme.desc: Molly Yeh creates a springtime feast to celebrate planting season on the farm. The meal includes her juicy one-skillet chicken with spring vegetables, crispy dill flakey bread, and a nutty walnut romesco sauce for dunking.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Sister Supper
programme.desc: Kardea Brown gets her sisters together for a special Southern dinner. The scrumptious menu includes fried pork chops with homemade table gravy and rainbow rice pilaf. For dessert, Kardea bakes up a treat that all the sisters love, red velvet sheet cake.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Mom's Birthday
programme.desc: Kardea Brown celebrates her mom's big day with her mom's favorite Tex-Mex meal. The stars of this birthday menu are Carne Asada Chimichangas and an extra-special Brown Butter Cake with a Mexican Hot Chocolate Ganache.

programme.title: The Kitchen: High Roller Steakhouse Dinner at Home!
programme.desc: The hosts cook decadent, delicious dishes inspired by Las Vegas. Jeff and Katie make an over-the-top surf n' turf, Geoffrey shows how to make an impressive tableside Caesar salad and Alex makes a fiery dessert.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Alaskan Alliance
programme.desc: The five food truck teams are tested as they go deep-sea fishing in order to earn their seed money from Tyler Florence. The Alaskan elements are taking their toll not just on the teams but also on the trucks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fusion of Flavors
programme.desc: In Chicago, a saucy spot mashes up Latin and Asian, putting a unique spin on paella and posole. A comfort food joint in Seattle fires things up with Nashville hot chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tri-Continent Cuisine
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's checking out killer cuisine spanning three different continents. In Denver, a unique quick service spot dishes out a creative take on Indian curry. Then in northwest Denver, a Brazilian bistro cooks up the bomb croquettes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Poutine, Pizza and Pork
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri travels the country diving into some meaty masterpieces starting at a spot in Longmont, Colorado, that serves craft beer and primo pub grub like their piled-high poutine burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mama's Cookin'
programme.desc: Guy visits a dive in Oklahoma serving wings and waffles and a Polish joint in L.A.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Awkward
programme.desc: Jenna’s jealousy mounts as the charter guests continue to shamelessly flirt with Adam. Paget and Ciara can’t get on the same page but Paget and Georgia are perfectly in tune. Adam makes a big romantic gesture for Jenna that backfires.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: The Birds
programme.desc: A murder of crows in the mast stirs up seafaring superstitions that put the crew on edge and the boat on its side. Madison and Georgia friendship is pushed to the brink. While Paget and Chris begin a very British bromance, Adam keeps Genna at a distance.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: You Snooze, You Lose
programme.desc: Jenna and Adam try to move forward in their strained relationship. When Jenna joins Adam for a nap on her break, Madison and Ciara pick up the slack in service, and Glenn takes notice. Chris gets injured handling a heavy water toy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Dope!
programme.desc: Captain Glenn confronts Jenna about her relationship with Adam. A doctor visits and delivers bad news that could end one crew member’s career. Captain Glenn is shocked to learn that someone may have brought illegal drugs onto the boat.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Regatta Go!
programme.desc: The season finale finds a drug search on board the Parsifal III, sending some crew into a panic. A heated conflict erupts in the interior department, causing tensions to boil over. Captain Glenn takes the crew out one final time for a birthday.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Running on Fumes

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Nookie Mistake

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Smoldering Secrets

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Barrie'd Alive

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters at Fort Madness

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Ice Fortress

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Legend of Jesse James
programme.desc: Josh journeys across the American Midwest in search of the legendary golden loot of Jesse James. Along the way, Josh debunks Jesse James myths, rappels off a cliff on Wichita Mt. and follows treasure hunters into Buzzards Roost.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Code to Gold
programme.desc: Josh scours Virginia backcountry in search of the legendary Thomas Beale Treasure, worth millions today. With encrypted codes hiding its whereabouts, Josh takes a detour to Philadelphia to uncover missing pieces to the puzzle.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Expedition: Back to the Future
programme.desc: On an empty desert road, Doc Brown arrives with a wild request for Josh Gates: find the time machine, get it to Michael J. Fox, the future depends on it.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Gold Rush of the Atlantic
programme.desc: Josh Gates has a fresh lead on the massive lost treasure of the shipwrecked 1715 Spanish fleet. Josh returns to the waters of Florida's Atlantic coast and dives in with a new expedition that uses the latest high tech to locate the fleet's flagship.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Secret Solved
programme.desc: Breaking news forces Josh to race across the globe. One of the wickedly hard puzzles of The Secret, a case Josh has been chasing for years, might have been solved. He's been crisscrossing the US to track it down, but this solve is in Josh's hometown.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Expedition: Back to the Future
programme.desc: On an empty desert road, Doc Brown arrives with a wild request for Josh Gates: find the time machine, get it to Michael J. Fox, the future depends on it.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Lost Tomb of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: Josh travels to Hungary to join three separate archeological teams looking for the lost tomb of Attila the Hun. Legends and ancient texts lead the search from the bottom of the Danube to the mountain forests just outside of Budapest.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Africa's Cursed Lake of Gold
programme.desc: Josh journeys to the wilds of Namibia to embark on a treacherously deep dive in Lake Otjikoto for a long lost World War I treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Expedition: Back to the Future
programme.desc: On an empty desert road, Doc Brown arrives with a wild request for Josh Gates: find the time machine, get it to Michael J. Fox, the future depends on it.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Origins of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Josh travels to his ancestral home of Great Britain to explore the origins of Stonehenge. From high in the air to deep under the sea, he finds an unexpected network of monuments that could have inspired one of history's most mystical locations.

programme.title: Diabolical: Til' Death Do We Part
programme.desc: Lyle and Carol Kopenskey are high school sweethearts who marry after graduation. The couple that other couples want to be like. But after 40 years of marital bliss, an old friend returns to the fold and jealousies turn passions into cold blooded murder.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Friend Request
programme.desc: When single mom Rosita accepts a stranger's friend request, she has no idea he's hiding a terrifying secret that will lead to a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Warning Signs
programme.desc: A Deputy reports a 1990 Dodge Intrepid pushed over an embankment just south of Gig Harbor, Washington. He investigates and discovers the dead body of missing Puyallup father, Randall Ferguson, in the trunk. He had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: a dead man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness. But when the young victim's checkered past is uncovered, Kenda must wade through a laundry list of potential suspects to find the man's killer.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: A Dying Plea
programme.desc: 16 years after Jerome Scott was found stabbed to death in his home, police moved in on his ex-wife, Patricia Wright, claiming she killed him out of rage for money. Now, her sister and daughter are on a crusade to prove the wrong person is behind bars.

programme.title: True Conviction: Murder in New England
programme.desc: After grandmother Irene Kennedy is found dead in a park, her family is split apart when a distant relative is charged with her murder. It will take years, another killing and a jail house snitch to bring the family back together.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Cris-Cross
programme.desc: In 2004, Detective Postiglione investigates the rare double homicide of two young college students in an apartment near a Nashville university. When a third victim is gunned down, a state-wide manhunt in launched to find the killer.

programme.title: The Last 24: Deadly Currents
programme.desc: Searching for a dismembered New Hampshire woman's killer, police identify a series of potential suspects including a mysterious drifter named Razor. But the truth lies in a missing persons report, and a one-eyed teddy bear.

programme.title: The Last 24: A Dangerous Business
programme.desc: A successful vacuum salesman is gunned down outside his Indiana office. As detectives untangle the victims' final 24 hours, all the clues point to a hired hit. But they eventually find the killer much closer to home.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What If
programme.desc: 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, newly pregnant, has vanished while visiting her on-again-off-again boyfriend. Her mother's desperate search leads to a disturbing connection with another mother miles away.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Nose Job Murder
programme.desc: A young lawyer fails to show up for a blind date. He's been shot to death in his apartment. And another woman freely admits she pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Evil Twins: The Candymen
programme.desc: The George Brothers grew up privileged, but had no respect for authority. In Florida's pill-mill epidemic of the late 2000s, the Georges rose to millionaire status, only to crash amidst a chaos of overdoses, arrests and a tragic train accident.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Fatal Fraternity
programme.desc: Identical twins Wasel and Wael Ali were obsessed with power from an early age. Using false identities they torment unsuspecting people until they become victims of their own game. These twins share more than DNA, they share the same deadly fate.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Other Modesto Girl
programme.desc: The world knows about Laci Peterson and Chandra Levy, but what about the 'other' Modesto girl, Dena Raley-McCluskey, whose sudden disappearance was no less shocking - and mysterious.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: An Affair to Forget
programme.desc: A young college student embarks on a secret affair with a police officer.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer Cougars
programme.desc: Some women can't resist bad boys, but when the fur flies, these women reveal their deadly side.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Schooled in Murder
programme.desc: A lunch break devolves into a nightmare for two school secretaries who disappear in broad daylight. One woman is found dead, launching an intense search for her missing friend. As police collect evidence, they suspect the culprit has ties to the school.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Slaying Season
programme.desc: When a single mother of three misses a routine bank run with her sister, panic begins to spread among the family. The family's nightmare becomes a reality when a passerby finds the beloved petite woman brutally assaulted, nude, and frozen in an alley.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: The Millers always thought something was off with their oldest son Steven. But as he slips from strange into sinister, there's no telling how far Steven will go to get his respected New York family's attention.

programme.title: American Monster: Who Am I?
programme.desc: When Dianne Hart and Donnie Rudd begin an affair in a small Chicago suburb, Dianne's kids hope that their mom has found love. But instead it triggers a series of bizarre lies and deceptions that reveal a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Ancient Astronauts
programme.desc: The idea of ancient astronauts goes back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenged religion and science. Find out who his enemies were, what his influences were, and why he was jailed.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: Documenting the life of the money-loving mafia man Joe Colombo, who campaigned against harassment of Italian-Americans in the 1970s.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: John Gotti
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname `Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Al Capone
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St. Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by U.S. government, Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New England

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago may be famous for its architecture, but we're here for the food. We've got a deep love for Gino's deep dish pizza, and the pork rinds at Publican are some of the best ever. The classic Chicago dog at Weiner Circle can't be topped.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Dallas

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Charlotte
programme.desc: Andrew explores Charlotte, NC, a city where big banking meets blue-collar traditions and is buzzing with amazing food. He zeroes in on barbecue, livermush, fried green tomatoes and other eats that are oozing Southern charm.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kyoto

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whirlybrains/ MermaidPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad of flying your own brain like a tiny drone. When SpongeBob and Patrick play Mermaidman and Barnacleboy, it's all fun and games until their sworn enemies arrive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutmare/ Bulletin Board
programme.desc: Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Deadly Venom
programme.desc: Karai is brainwashed and starts hunting the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtles in Time
programme.desc: The Turtles get whisked through time by apprentice Time Master Renet, and they must all work together to defeat the evil Time Master Savanti Romero.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tale of the Yokai
programme.desc: The Turtles are accidentally transported to the past where they cross paths with a familiar ninja clan.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Attack of the Mega Shredder!
programme.desc: Leo decides to sneak into Shredder's Lair alone only to face the biggest mutant threat yet.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Creeping Doom
programme.desc: After an accident, Donnie finds himself slowly losing his intelligence.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Fourfold Trap
programme.desc: The Turtles are baited by an unknown enemy into deadly traps.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Winning Attitude
programme.desc: Izzy is determined to win a big race with the help of her Special Olympics athlete cousin, Lily. After Lily misses a training session and Izzy rejects more help, her sportsmanship is put to the test.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Dinosaur Seen in Sewers!
programme.desc: When Raph makes a new friend in Zog, an alien Triceraton, he may have bitten off more than he can chew.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mime Games
programme.desc: Bose must try and stop The Toddler from breaking into The Man's Nest when Danger Force and Captain man are called to Paris.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Clone Babies/ Flying Spiders
programme.desc: Feeling that being Captain Man is too much work for just one person, Ray and Schwoz hatch the perfect plan: clone Ray.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Tiny Toddler/ Magical Beefery Tour
programme.desc: After misplacing the shrink ray, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to battle The Toddler to win it back. Captain man and Kid Danger find a golden pickle in their burger which wins them a private tour of the secretive factory where Beefo's Burgers are made.

programme.title: Henry Danger: A Piñata Full of Death Bugs
programme.desc: When a dangerous piñata ends up at a kid's birthday party, Kid Danger and Captain Man must go undercover and step in before it's too late.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Scream Machine
programme.desc: When Charlotte's invention for The Gizmo Show is accidentally destroyed and then rebuilt, Charlotte worries that the attention she gets could expose Kid Danger and Captain Man's secret identity.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Mouth Candy
programme.desc: Jasper's enthusiasm in crime fighting leads him to send Captain Man and Kid Danger into incidents that are not crimes.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Green Fingers
programme.desc: After Schwoz creates a disease that accidentally effects Charlotte, Henry, his family, and even Ray, he quarantines them in Henry's house in order to find a cure.

programme.title: Henry Danger: License to Fly
programme.desc: Ray agrees to let Henry fly his helicopter, but it's too much for Ray when he starts to act like a nervous parent. Charlotte, Jasper, and Piper find a cotton candy machine in Junk-N-Stuff and start making cotton candy.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Balloons of Doom
programme.desc: When Dr. Minyak takes the Man Fans hostage, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to find a way to rescue them without Dr. Minyak seeing them move.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Brawl in the Hall
programme.desc: When Charlotte is challenged to a fight at school, Captain Man and Kid Danger step in to try and help Charlotte defend herself.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Double-O Danger
programme.desc: Kid Danger and Captain Man attempt to capture Mob Boss Rob Moss by infiltrating his daughter's sweet sixteen birthday party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: This Is Your Backstory
programme.desc: Agent P realizes there is more going on with Norm than just a simple odd reality show to celebrate his creator, Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: DuckTales: The First Adventure!
programme.desc: Scrooge is forced to babysit young Donald and Della as they go on their first adventure to find a powerful artifact, unaware that Bradford is taking on this mission personally.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego
programme.desc: Professional mech-wrestler El Fuego is intent on becoming the toughest fighter in San Fransokyo and decides he must beat the strongest challenger he can find, Baymax.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Love at First Byte/ One Good Turn
programme.desc: Mom asks for help and Candace and Stacy compete in Ultimate Obstacle Course.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's a Mud, Mud, Mud, Mud World/ The Ballad of Badbeard
programme.desc: Grandpa tells the story of a mysterious pirate legend surrounding the old lake around their house. Candice is too scared to learn how to drive, but the boys try to help her overcome the fear.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Rivalry Weak
programme.desc: Honey Lemon secretly takes art classes at SFIT’s rival, SFAI, and soon finds herself caught in the middle of both schools’ annual Rivalry Week.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Fate of the Roommates
programme.desc: Honey Lemon learns that she can return to her dorm, but Go Go realizes she doesn't want her to move out. The team looks to stop a secret underground racing league.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Matchmaker/ School Spirit
programme.desc: In an effort to get a better grade on her math test, Star offers to help her teacher Miss Skullnick with her love life but accidentally turns her into a troll. Star sets booby traps to protect the football team.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Blood Moon Ball/ Fortune Cookies
programme.desc: Star accepts her ex-boyfriend Tom's invitation to Demon Prom, but Marco is suspicious of Tom's intentions and crashes the prom to prevent Star from getting her heart broken again.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Friendenemies/ Is Mystery
programme.desc: When Tom vies for Marco's company instead of Star's, Marco becomes suspicious. Later, worried about his tadpoles' futures, Buff Frog investigates the hole in the Mewman force field.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Baby/ Running With Scissors
programme.desc: Star has to show her fairy godmother what she’s learned about magic. Marco abuses the Dimensional Scissors when he discovers their usefulness in accomplishing everyday chores.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Collateral Damage/ Just Friends
programme.desc: Star has to restore Echo Creek High's spirit after the destruction of the Possum Statue; Star doesn't want Jackie to feel like a third wheel.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Star on Wheels/ Fetch
programme.desc: When Marco teaches Star how to ride a bike but forgets to tell her about brakes, he teams up with Oskar and Glossaryck to save her. A mysterious stray dog steals Star's wand and refuses give it back.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part One
programme.desc: When the Goblin opens portals to alternate worlds, Spider-Man must team up with alternative versions of himself to stop his archenemy.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part Two
programme.desc: Spider-Man's adventures in alternate worlds continue when he meets Spider-Man Noir, a Spider-Man from a black and white retro world. Then, after travelling to a place where all The Avengers are animals, our hero teams up with Spider-Ham!

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part Three
programme.desc: In his pursuit of Goblin, Spider-Man teams up with Spider-Knight, a medieval Spider-Man. Spidey also meets Miles Morales, a young Spider-Man from a world where Peter Parker fell in the line of duty!

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part Four
programme.desc: Goblin's plan comes to fruition as he and Spdier-Man return to their own reality. To stop Goblin, Spider-Man needs the help of the other Spider-Man he met along his journey, but Electro makes a play against both sides.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Persistence! Kolossal Strike!
Beyblade: Burst Surge: Listen To Your Bey's Voice!
Phineas and Ferb: Sleepwalk Surprise/ Sci-Fi Pie Fly
programme.desc: Candace's plans to hang out with Jeremy are derailed after he becomes interested in playing a new game. Phineas and Ferbs create their own flying saucer to help solve a mystery.

programme.title: DuckTales: New Gods on the Block!
programme.desc: The kids try to prove themselves by auditioning to take Zeus’ place amongst the Greek gods, while Storkules interferes with Donald and Daisy’s date.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Cobra and Mongoose / Better Off Fred
programme.desc: Fred is attacked by mechanical cobras, however their target is a former spy codename: Mongoose! Fred meets the girls of his dreams, only to be rejected by her.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: The Owl House: Young Blood, Old Souls
programme.desc: Luz's skills as a witch are put to the test when she attempts the impossible.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: If Books Could Kill/ There Will Be Nachos
programme.desc: Kick challenged a library's return policy after Gunther accidentally brings back a book signed by Kick's idol Billy Stumps. Kick is then determined to crash a party held by Brad, even though he was not invited, in an attempt to score some nachos.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Brad's Room/ Dude, Where's My Wade?
programme.desc: When Kick's room is destroyed, Dad grounds Kick and makes him move into Brad's room where he must abide by his older brother's ridiculous rules. Kick and Gunther follow clues to track down Wade when he goes missing before the safety inspector's visit.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Big Mouth/ Last Fan Standing
programme.desc: Kick can't get a wink of sleep when Wacky Jackie and Cousin Kyle throw him a celebration in honour of his latest stunt.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kickasaurus Wrecks/ Battle for the 'Snax
programme.desc: Kick is forced into a shrimp costume after being hired to perform during the halftime show for a local football team. Gunther's parents are forced to sell their beloved restaurant and move back to the old country unless Kick can help them get customers.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: For the Love of Gunther/ Father From the Truth
programme.desc: Kick trains his best friend to be a stuntman when Gunther reveals he has a crush.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Sold!/ Faceplant
programme.desc: An extraordinary kid named Kick is determined to become the world's greatest daredevil.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Bwar and Peace
programme.desc: Kick and Gunther venture to the Old Country where Gunther is mistaken for a warrior.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: You've Been Brad'd/ Sleepover
programme.desc: After Kick discovers that he is the sole target of Brad's new Internet prank show, he must find a way to avoid his brother and complete an impossible stunt.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kicked Out/ Kick the Habit
programme.desc: When Kick's new hangout is taken over by Brad and his friends, Kick does everything in his power to keep the newfound space as his own.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Swap Meet/ Bee Awesome
programme.desc: An extraordinary kid named Kick is determined to become the world's greatest daredevil.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: From the Ashes

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Darkest Hour

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: A Tangled Web in Texas

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Revving up a '69 Riviera

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Rocking '76 G10 Van

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Back to the '80s in a '68 Coronet
programme.desc: Richard buys a '69 Malibu only to realize there are massive issues. Aaron crashes into a '68 Coronet on the GMG lot. Richard travels to St. Louis to buy a tricked out '79 Camaro. Motley Crue performs at Gas Monkey Live grand opening.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: '71 Scat Pack Challenger, Part I

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: '71 Scat Pack Challenger, Part II
programme.desc: Aaron and his team attempt to get the '71 Challenger build to accept the 2015 Challenger technology. In the process, they create a one of a kind resto/ mod. Richard buys a busted up '34 Plymouth and the crew takes the '57 Shorty bus for a test drive.

programme.desc: Chandler's reunited with his beloved cigarettes, which the rest of his friends can't stand. Monica dates a man all her buddies love but with whom she's bored. And Phoebe can't deal with the fact that her bank gave her one thousand dollars that isn't hers.

programme.title: Friends: The One With George Stephanopoulos
programme.desc: When a pizza guy accidentally delivers a pizza meant for George Stephanopoulos, who lives across the street to the female friends, the women decide to peek at the towel-clad former White House advisor with their binoculars.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the East German Laundry Detergent
programme.desc: Joey wants to get back together with a former girlfriend he dumped, so he tricks Monica into posing as his new gal pal. Ross helps Rachel, a laundry virgin, do her first load of wash. Chandler has a difficult time breaking up with his annoying girlfriend.

programme.title: Mom: Somebody's Grandmother and the A-List
programme.desc: Christy helps Marjorie prepare for her first date since her husband’s passing. Also, Bonnie’s friendship with Jill is put to the test when a past indiscretion resurfaces.

programme.title: Mom: Judy Garland and a Sexy Troll Doll
programme.desc: Bonnie helps Christy gain perspective as she considers a life-changing decision. Also, Jill fears she’s running out of time to have a baby and consults a fertility doctor.

programme.title: Mom: Beef Baloney Dan and the Hot Zone
programme.desc: Bonnie suspects that Adam’s sponsor has an ulterior motive. Christy is caught in the middle when Tammy plays hard to get with Chef Rudy.

programme.title: Mom: A Judgy Face and Your Grandma's Drawers
programme.desc: Christy, Bonnie and the ladies step in to help when Marjorie babysits her granddaughter for the first time.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Loaf of Bread and a Grand Old Flag
programme.desc: Things spiral out of control when Sheldon boycotts his favorite bread company. Also, Georgie offers Veronica a shoulder to cry on when she’s dumped by her boyfriend.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Albert Einstein and the Story of Another Mary
programme.desc: Inspired by his hero, Albert Einstein, Sheldon tries his hand at the violin. Also, Mary and Meemaw secretly buy a pregnancy test when Mary thinks she's pregnant.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Perfect Score and a Bunsen Burner Marshmallow
programme.desc: Sheldon moves in with Dr. Sturgis for the weekend to see what his life will be like in college. Also, a lonely Mary tries to bond with the other Coopers during Sheldon’s absence.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Political Campaign and a Candy Land Cheater
programme.desc: Unhappy that school funds are going towards football rather than academics, Sheldon decides to run for class president.

programme.title: Full House: Nicky and/ or Alexander
programme.desc: While Rebecca returns home after the birth of the twins, Danny gets a new co-host.

programme.title: Full House: Come Fly With Me
programme.desc: D.J.'s happy homecoming from Spain is upset when her sisters end-up in New Zealand.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid Noir/ ScavengerPants
programme.desc: When his clarinet goes missing, Squidward must become a hardboiled detective to track it down. Squidward sends SpongeBob and Patrick on an increasingly difficult scavenger hunt to get them out of his hair.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: When I Grow Up/ Police Station
programme.desc: It's time for playgroup, and today Peppa and friends are deciding what they might like to be when they grow up. In the group, there are nurses, police officers, and even pirates, but it takes Peppa a little longer to figure out what she wants to be.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: The Sleepy Princess/ Fancy Dress Party/ Mister Skinnylegs/ Musical Instruments/ The Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: It is bedtime but Peppa isn't at all sleepy so Daddy Pig tells a story. Peppa and George are having a fancy dress party. George finds a friendly spider. Mummy and Daddy Pig find an old box. One of Peppa's teeth falls out.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Peppa's Circus/ Night Animals/ Pirate Treasure/ Garden Games/ Going Boating
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig has put up a tent in his garden, and Peppa and her friends decide it’s a perfect place to put on a circus. Then, Peppa and George have stayed up late at Grandpa and Granny's to help hunt for slugs and snails.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Mandy Mouse/ Recorders/ Miss Rabbit's Relaxation Class

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Something Smells/ Bossy Boots

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Mrs. Puff, You're Fired

programme.title: Storage Wars: Some Like It Hotter
programme.desc: A few locals give Rene a run for his money, but that doesn't stop Mary from bidding beyond her budget.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock the Vote!

programme.title: Storage Wars: All Bid and No Bite
programme.desc: The day starts rough, but nothing can stop the hunt for treasure as the buyers head to Rancho Palos Verdes, CA. Mary has to stay on a budget and learns a hard lesson about Dave. Rene tries a secret strategy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Just Deserts
programme.desc: Ivy uses a dastardly tactic to rouse the competition as the auction forces Mary to travel well out of her comfort zone. Rene steps up his game, while Darrell tries to score despite Brandon's sour mood.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Downtown Lockers and Uptown Dreams
programme.desc: An auction challenges the buyers to find a score in a tower of lockers in downtown Los Angeles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pity in Pink
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: GaTa

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Bobby Lee
programme.desc: The three chefs make recreations of McDonald's Sausage McMuffin with egg for Bobby Lee.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Food After Da' Club Episode
programme.desc: The guys hit the virtual nightclub with DJ Marshmello and Edie Falco. Joe sends the guys some bottle service.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Childhood Meals Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe eat a childhood meal with Colin Jost. Plus, Sal fools his mom into thinking she owes 20% of her produce to the government.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.desc: An interior designer wants to buy a starter home in Laurel, and Ben and Erin are up for the challenge. Whether she picks the quaint cottage or the former rental, Erin is excited to flex her design muscles with a boho/ mid-modern style her colleague loves.

programme.title: Home Town: Memory Lane: Home Away From Home
programme.desc: A couple wants a vacation home that's big enough to entertain but manageable to maintain. After showing them a 1920s cottage and a 1912 Craftsman, Ben and Erin create the perfect getaway for them with a large chef's kitchen.

programme.title: Home Town: Color Psychology
programme.desc: A couple who runs a non-profit is investing in a property that provides transitional housing for women recovering from difficulties. Ben and Erin get scrappy and turn a neglected building into an uplifting oasis where new beginnings can flourish.

programme.title: Home Town: A Quiet Place to Call Home
programme.desc: After renting his whole life, a local pastor is ready to settle down in a house that will give him enough space for his cooking and gardening hobbies.

programme.desc: After renting his whole life, a local pastor is ready to settle down in a house that will give him enough space for his cooking and gardening hobbies.

programme.title: Home Town: A Doctor in the House
programme.desc: Ben and Erin are eager to welcome a new pediatrician who hopes to settle down with his wife and work in the beautiful community. The couple wants a historical charmer with room to grow and a spacious outdoor area for entertaining.

programme.title: Home Town: An Old Familiar Place
programme.desc: After being away for 30 years, a woman dreams of retiring in the small town where she has fond memories of her childhood. With her all-in budget of $120,000, Erin designs an elegant home while Ben creates some unique builds including a laundry shoot.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Addition and Subtraction
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Garden Grove, California, that is in need of a major makeover. The house is small and needs a lot of work, but it does have a large yard where they could add an extra bathroom or bedroom.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Wishful Workshop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Garden Grove, California. They always do well in this neighborhood and see big potential with this house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Beaming With Potential
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a four-bedroom home in Cypress, California, that the owner is looking to sell quickly. The home is a mess but already has an open floor plan, which will save them money in the long run.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Switching Rooms
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by a homeowner wanting to sell a four-bedroom home in Garden Grove, California. Knowing the high returns for the area they decide to go for it, but they find the layout strange and question its four bedrooms.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Shattered Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a four bedroom, two bathroom home in Lakewood, CA. Their hopes and dreams of a great deal in a good neighbourhood are shattered, however, when they discover that the dilapidated house has been vandalized.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flipping and Dating
programme.desc: Tarek gets a lead on a house in Diamond Bar, CA, and asks Christina to meet him to view the property. Tarek rushes off for a date and Christina pokes fun at him. The underlying tension leads to a blowout.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: New Normal in Arcadia
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a large home in the unfamiliar neighborhood of Arcadia, CA, but their differing opinions threaten their profit margin in an area with a high market standard.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Infested Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina land on a small three-bedroom, two-bathroom home that needs a lot of work in Santa Ana, California. While deciding how to rehab the home, they clash over style so decide to compete to see who has the better design.

programme.title: Nate and Jeremiah: Save My House: Saving a Tradition
programme.desc: Watch as Nate and Jeremiah step in to save a family's Sunday dinner tradition. A small kitchen and an awkward layout leaves a couple with no room to host their extended family, and threatens to end their traditional 40-year gatherings.

programme.title: Nate and Jeremiah: Save My House: Waiting on a Dream
programme.desc: Watch as Nate and Jeremiah step in to help a man keep a promise to his wife to turn their hilltop fixer-upper into a dream home.

programme.title: Nate and Jeremiah: Save My House: Too Long in Limbo
programme.desc: Andy and Shea are stuck in renovation limbo, and things are so bad that they've put their marriage on hold and she's in therapy. Watch as Nate and Jeremiah take on this project and hopefully save their relationship in the process.

programme.title: Nate and Jeremiah: Save My House: American Nightmare
programme.desc: Watch as Nate and Jeremiah step in to help a couple whose home has HVAC and mold issues that require their kids to sleep on a sofa.

programme.title: Nate and Jeremiah: Save My House: Connecting a Family
programme.desc: Brandy and Steve are novices to renovation and the simple projects they've attempted have failed miserably. Watch as Nate and Jeremiah help them create a home where they connect better as a family and create memories that will last.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Hunt for D.B. Cooper
programme.desc: Christof jumps from a plane and digs up rare FBI files as he follows shocking new leads that take him from the Pacific Northwest to Las Vegas and Utah in his quest to find the real identity of hijacker D.B. Cooper.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Butch Cassidy's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Christof uncovers new clues about the true fate of outlaws Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid. He travels to the highlands of Bolivia and the mountains of Utah to dig up evidence that may finally solve this 100-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Axeman of New Orleans
programme.desc: A century ago, New Orleans was terrorized by an axe murderer. Now Christof discovers new leads that could point to some of the earliest mafia hits. This gruesome crime spree takes him from the Big Easy to Sicily and Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Black Dahlia Murder
programme.desc: Christof digs into the most infamous -- and gruesome -- unsolved murder case in Los Angeles history. He uncovers an investigation derailed by corruption and finds a confession pointing him to a new suspect in the Philippines.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Boston's Unsolved Art Heist
programme.desc: Christof investigates the robbery of the Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum, the largest art heist in history. In pursuit of the stolen masterpieces, he follows leads from dangerous members of organized crime that take him from Boston to Florida and France.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Lost Treasure of Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: Christof joins the decades-long hunt for the buried millions of notorious gangster Dutch Schultz. Armed with rare documents and cutting-edge tech, Christof follows the fugitive mob boss's trail from Saratoga Springs, New York, to Miami, Florida.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Escape From Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three prisoners escaped from Alcatraz in 1962. Officially, they died in the surrounding waters, but FBI files say otherwise. Christof Putzel braves those same waters to hunt down inside information before going on a manhunt to Brazil.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Decoding America's UFO Secrets
programme.desc: Christof heads to the woods of the UK and snowy fields of Canada to determine what the truth is behind UFO sightings. He soon uncovers a much bigger story behind what secrets the government is hiding.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Native Americans and Star People
programme.desc: Astonishing new evidence and modern-day UFO sightings have experts rethinking ancient otherworldly Native American myths.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Front Page News

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: 10.10.20
