programme.desc: Dr. David Jeremiah will help you discover God's truth through practical, life-changing, Bible teachings and apply them to circumstances in your life today.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Plane Crazy
programme.desc: Chumlee has purchased some fake art and Rick is not impressed; the shop tries to buy it's first ever plane but some excess baggage may leave this purchase grounded.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Aw Shucks!
programme.desc: The guys meet a man who is hoping to sell a mysterious coin from the 1800's believed to be from George Washington's funeral.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Peeping Pawn
programme.desc: The team is presented with a rare 1776 Massachusetts penny made by Paul Revere. Rick gets the chance to buy a hand grenade made by a top-secret American World War II spy program. A man hopes to sell his 1950s peep show machine.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ready, Set, Pawn
programme.desc: A seller brings in a competition dragster racecar. Rick and Corey check out a Japanese landmine training kit from World War II. A fully restored 1957 Dr. Pepper vending machine is up for grabs.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Just Shoe It
programme.desc: Rick and Chumlee check out a massive collection of Nike shoes.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: King of Pain
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are a man down when Corey arrives at work with an injured hand and ankle. Rick brushes up on contemporary art when an oil painting by Jim Daly comes into the shop. The guys also get a custom built Harley Davidson rat bike.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: A letter signed by Napoleon Bonaparte marches into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: World Series of Pawn
programme.desc: The guys look at a Los Angeles Dodgers World Series pennant signed by Frank Sinatra.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Corey's Big Splurge
programme.desc: The guys remember the '80s as they check out a replica of the proton pack from 'Ghostbusters.' Then, a seller brings in an original work by the street artist Banksy, and Rick and Corey take their 1951 'Steve McQueen' Chevy to an auction.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Brush With Greatness
programme.desc: The guys check out a painting by Muhammad Ali. Then, Corey and Chumlee eye a Colt Dragoon pistol.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Pawn of Lies
programme.desc: Two original lithographs by graphic artist M.C. Escher; a censored recording made on a Soviet X-ray; a Wells Fargo model stagecoach; a 1950s toy lie detector.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawning Pistols
programme.desc: A pair of Duck's Foot pistols, a bar of Yellow Kid soap from an 1896 newspaper comic, a Vicotrian-era hand crank device.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Buddy, Can You Spare a Thousand?
programme.desc: Rick might pay 10 times the face value of a rare $1,000 star note. He later pursues the purchase of a World War II Navy gun scope. Chumlee investigates the mysterious legacy of an ancient bronze statue. Rick and Corey check out an iconic storyboard.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Killer Pawn
programme.desc: A signed shower curtain by Anthony Perkins; an 1882 Gold Certificate and 1918 Federal Reserve note; an 1800s Millionaire Calculator; a 1950s Russian night vision scope.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawning Reagan
programme.desc: A rare double lock musket finds its way to the shop. An autographed photo of Laurel and Hardy is offered to Rick. A foam Ronald Reagan head has Corey intrigued.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Frontier Fortune
programme.desc: Strum along with the Pawn Stars when a Gibson lap steel guitar jams into the shop. Next, a letter from pioneer Ezra Meeker and a set of commemorative Oregon Trail coins trek on in. Then, a Victorian snuff box shows up.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Royally Pawned
programme.desc: A set of royal British armor has Rick suiting up to strike a bargain. Chumlee's purchase of a U. S. Open custom electric guitar gets no love from Rick.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: President's Day Sale
programme.desc: Rick is after an autographed card of President Abraham Lincoln. Corey and Chum consider paying a hefty sum for a President Bill Clinton designed golf driver shaft, until discovering that he may not have used it himself.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Corey's House of Blues
programme.desc: A signed B.B. King guitar makes its way to the shop. Then, Chum and Rick head to a house full of art inspired by legendary pop artist, Andy Warhol. Later, Corey checks out a Japanese sword mount.

programme.title: Movie: Charade
programme.desc: A widow is pursued by several mysterious men who want her murdered husband's fortune.

programme.title: Movie: Arthur
programme.desc: A loveable millionaire risks it all when he falls in love with an irascible waitress.

programme.title: Movie: I Want to Live!
programme.desc: A prostitute who is convicted of murder fights to escape her execution in the 1950s.

programme.title: Movie: Back Street
programme.desc: A designer meets her long-lost love who is unhappily married.

programme.title: Movie: Captain Salvation
programme.desc: A disillusioned priest signs onto a ship, where he is reunited with a wayward woman.

programme.title: Movie: Black Narcissus
programme.desc: Five nuns bear physical and psychological hardships as they struggle to build a mission in a remote abandoned palace, high in the Himalayas.

programme.title: Movie: Bianco e nero
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie: Riffraff
programme.desc: A couple in the fishing business end up on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Movie: Anna Christie
programme.desc: A Swedish girl attempts to keep her past from both her long-lost father and a sailor.

programme.title: Movie: Mutiny on the Bounty
programme.desc: Roger Byam joins Captain Bligh and Fletcher Christian aboard the HMS Bounty for a trip to Tahiti. After six months in Tahiti, the crew is homeward bound when Christian leads the crew to mutiny; Byam must defend himself against charges of aiding Christian.

programme.title: Movie: Smilin' Through
programme.desc: A woman falls for the son of her aunt's killer, despite her uncle's objections.

programme.title: Movie: Camille
programme.desc: A kept woman leaves her patron when she falls in love with a young man. In fear of ruining his career prospects and his position in society, she leaves him and soon falls into poverty and illness.

programme.title: Movie: Romeo and Juliet
programme.desc: Two teenagers from feuding families fall in love at first sight and try to be together.

programme.title: Jessie: Trashin' Fashion
programme.desc: Emma is excited that her mom is planning a fashion show to showcase her new teen fashion line. Once Emma sees the terrible designs, she becomes conflicted about whether she should give honest reviews on her fashion blog.

programme.title: Jessie: 101 Lizards
programme.desc: When Ravi realizes he can't care for Ms. Kipling and 12 baby lizards, a slew of misunderstandings ensues, leading Jessie and kids to think that Ms. Chesterfield hired someone to turn them into belts and purses.

programme.title: Jessie: The Trouble With Tessie
programme.desc: Jessie is concerned that Tony has become controlling, clingy and insecure in their relationship. After Tony invites her out for a 'very special night' to meet his parents, she is terrified that he is going to propose.

programme.title: Jessie: Say Yes to the Messy Dress
programme.desc: When NBA player Chris Bosh needs somewhere to stay, Jessie volunteers the penthouse.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Diff'rent Strikes
programme.desc: When school is interrupted by a Chicago teachers' strike, Booker has a vision and enlists Nia, Levi and Tess to help him start a home study group that quickly spirals out of control.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: A Few Good Mentors
programme.desc: As part of a yearly 8th grade tradition, Syd and Olive get paired with two 6th graders to mentor.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Warlock World: War of the Warlocks
programme.desc: The Bennett-Blatts visit a local comic convention, and Owen, Byron and Rachel test out a new VR game.

programme.title: Big City Greens: The Van/ Bat Girl
programme.desc: Gramma and Cricket are upset that an ugly van has been parked in front of their house for what seems like forever. Then, Nancy joins Cricket and Tilly's community center little league team.

programme.title: Jessie: Zuri's New Old Friend
programme.desc: Jessie wants Zuri to play with real friends instead of imaginary ones, but when Zuri befriends the much older Nana Bananas who wears yellow track suits, talks to herself in the park and constantly squeaks a yellow horn, Jessie is worried.

programme.title: Jessie: World Wide Web of Lies
programme.desc: Jessie is bullied by a bossy nanny named Agatha at the park and ends up on her Stroller Patroller, (a website that features pictures of nannies appearing to abuse their children).

programme.title: Jessie: Creepy Connie Comes a Callin'
programme.desc: Jessie believes a math tutor she finds for Luke will be the perfect scholarly influence. To Jessie's dismay, she turns out to be a lovelorn teen fascinated with Luke. Meanwhile, Ravi is convinced he can predict the future with his Mystery Ball.

programme.title: Jessie: Take the A-Train ... I Think?
programme.desc: To the kids' dismay, Jessie has everyone take the subway to the cultural fair at Emma's school. Meanwhile, Bertram and Ravi look for a pesky spider that has made its home in the apartment.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight
programme.desc: When Cricket gets sick, his family steps in to fulfill his commitments for the day. Chip Whistler shows up at the farmers’ market in an attempt to steal business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Jessie: Jessie Goes to Hollywood
programme.desc: When Christina Ross returns home, Jessie heads to L.A. for a role in a movie. When the kids realize that they still need her, however, they follow Jessie to Hollywood.

programme.title: Jessie: New York, New Nanny
programme.desc: Jessie accepts a job as a nanny and moves in with the Ross family: Christina, a former supermodel turned business mogul; Morgan, a famous movie director; their four kids Emma, Ravi, Luke and Zuri and their beloved Asian water monitor lizard.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Bro-Cave-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Joey and Parker’s room is so filthy that they try to get the girls to clean it for them. After losing a bet, the girls spend the night in the boys’ room and Liv regrets blaming her sister for losing after Maddie goes missing in Parker's tunnels.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Kathy Kan-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv becomes quick friends with Korean popstar and international teen sensation Kathy Kan when she comes to the states to study the actress for the Korean version of her hit show, 'Sing It Loud.'

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Filmmaking and Fear Breaking
programme.desc: Dez is filming his first big movie, and the whole gang jumps in to help. Austin nabs the starring role, Trish gets to play lots of characters and Ally offers to help out behind the camera. When it's Austin's turn, something triggers a fear and he panics.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: World Records and Work Wreckers
programme.desc: Austin and Dez set out to break a world record. Meanwhile, Ally accidentally hires her crush, Dallas, to help out at Sonic Boom. When it looks like she might have to fire him, she turns to Trish for advice.

programme.title: Jessie: Coffee Talk
programme.desc: Jessie gets two wristbands to a Bruno Mars concert so Emma and Zuri battle to be her guest, only to learn there's only one ticket. Bertram bonds with a talking coffee maker who Luke tries to steal to help him study for his Spanish test.

programme.title: Jessie: A Close Shave
programme.desc: Darla shows up and doesn't know that Jessie called off her wedding, so Jessie gets Tony to act like Brooks to try and fool her. Meanwhile, Luke is still trying to master the art of shaving his face for the first time.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Ikari Gozen
programme.desc: Kagami's mother gets akumatized into Ikari Gozen. Armed with her bokken, she wants to punish Kagami for disobeying her, and to lock her up forever in the giant armour that forms her body.

programme.title: Sofia the First
programme.desc: A little girl becomes a princess overnight and learns to adjust to royal life.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Minding the Manor
programme.desc: When Sofia is left in charge of Aunt Tilly’s house, she must protect it from a group of invading gargoyles.

programme.title: Bluey: Favourite Thing / Daddy Dropoff / Sleepytime
programme.desc: The Heelers take turns remembering their favourite thing from the day. It’s Dad’s turn to give the kids breakfast and drop them off at school. Bingo promises to wake up in her own bed.

programme.title: Bluey: Fairies/ Work/ Bumpy and the Wise Old Wolfhound
programme.desc: Bluey thinks there are Fairies in the backyard; Bluey and Bingo are hired by Dad at the drainpipe factory; Dad and Bluey send Bingo a video.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Close Encounters of a Pug Kind/ History Mystery
programme.desc: When Bob wants to meet someone from space, the pugs go to a gathering of UFO enthusiasts. When the pups find a doggie toy that isn't theirs, they go on a mission to find its owner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle
programme.desc: The puppies leap into action to assemble their own real-life team of puppy heroes. Bob takes the pugs on a conservation vacation where he volunteers to study sea turtles.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Ultimate Easter Egg Hunt/ A Chewy Challenge
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy’s next delivery, an egg, gets mixed up with the eggs for the Annual Easter Egg Hunt! Pip braves the desert heat with Freddy to deliver a baby camel to nomad parents!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Puppy Problems/ The Mighty Little Dragon
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a puppy who seems like a perfect angel, but turns out to be a mischievous rascal. Pip and Freddy pretend to be knights while delivering a Komodo dragon.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: One Small Ruff for Pup-kind / The Lost Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo take a wagon ride with their Dad to the park; Bluey has a taxi service with her Dad as her first passenger; Bluey tries to catch up to her Mum on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey: Helicopter/ Octopus/ Baby Race
programme.desc: Bluey turns a tree stump into a game of Helicopter. Chloe tries to teach her dad to play Bluey's game. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Lady Wifi
programme.desc: After being expelled from school, Alya is akumatized into Lady Wifi. A villain with a plan, Lady Wifi will stop at nothing to expose Ladybug, convinced that the girl behind the mask is none other than bratty Chloé Bourgeois.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Evillustrator
programme.desc: Ladybug has to stop the Evillustrator, an akumatized boy who wants revenge against ChloT.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Jessie: Moby and Scoby
programme.desc: When Jessie goes back to college, her and Ravi end up sharing the same class. Zuri brings home a baby giraffe from Africa.

programme.title: Jessie: Basket Case
programme.desc: Eager to play in Luke's basketball game, Ravi unexpectedly runs into LA Clippers star Chris Paul, who he enlists to coach him. Meanwhile, Jessie learns that Hudson is her new classmate and is unhappily forced to partner with him for an assignment.

programme.title: Jessie: Someone Has Tou-pay
programme.desc: Bertram bought a new toupee for his band's big performance, but when it goes missing, Jessie interrogates each of the kids in hopes of finding it.

programme.title: Jessie: Bye Bye Bertie
programme.desc: Bertram has had enough, so decides to quit and to go work for Mrs. Chesterfield. Meanwhile, the Ross family hires a new butler, Roger, who takes his job very seriously.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Snapped: Virginia Hyatt
programme.desc: When a Texarkana square dancer is gunned down on the steps of her palatial home, detectives follow a murky trail of surveillance footage leading straight to a killer with a taste for revenge.

programme.title: Snapped: Dana Flynn
programme.desc: The twisted story of a heinous murder plot in Kansas, rife with betrayal and deceit. In an exclusive interview with someone personally involved in the crime, hear a riveting account of the deadly scheme.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Guilty as Charged/ Family Ties
programme.desc: When a prominent attorney is found savagely stabbed to death in her office, investigators find themselves with a myriad of suspects - from violent felons to lesbian love triangles. In the end, they discover a killer as cold as they come.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Sex, Swingers and Death
programme.desc: To keep their marriage fresh, a young couple turns to a life of sex games and sharing spouses. But when threesomes and foursomes lead to murder, investigators struggle to prove who killed this swinger.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Sting
programme.desc: Newlywed Dalia Dippolito returned home from the gym to the awful news that her husband had been killed. In a case where almost nothing was as it seemed, investigators wanted to know: Was Dalia diabolical or an unwitting pawn in a hoax gone wrong.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Out There in the Dark
programme.desc: Brandy Daniels believed someone was stalking her. Then, the single mother was found slumped over in her car, shot dead. Investigators would spend years navigating the twists and turns searching for her killer.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Murder in the Parking Lot
programme.desc: Police search for an odd-looking gunman seen fleeing after shooting a young mom to death, and uncover a suspect who's not what they expect—with a motive that’s impossible to comprehend.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Deception in the Desert
programme.desc: When a soldier is gunned down on a dusty street in a California desert town, the investigation tests the bonds of friendship – and the limits of family loyalty – as police close in on the killer.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Motorcycles, Murder and Mystery
programme.desc: An outspoken radio personality and veterans' advocate is gunned down in her own bedroom. Did her strong opinions make her a target, or did a litany of family secrets lead to her murder?

programme.title: Dateline: The Watcher
programme.desc: A recent law school graduate with a promising future disappears without a trace in Georgia. What could have happened? Keith Morrison reports on the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Unthinkable: The Menendez Murders
programme.desc: The Menendez brothers were convicted more than two decades ago of murdering their parents. Lyle Menendez tells Keith Morrison from behind bars that despite admitting to brutally killing his parents, he believes he should have received a plea deal.

programme.title: Dateline: Unthinkable: The Menendez Murders
programme.desc: The Menendez brothers were convicted more than two decades ago of murdering their parents. Lyle Menendez tells Keith Morrison from behind bars that despite admitting to brutally killing his parents, he believes he should have received a plea deal.

programme.title: NCIS: Minimum Security
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team travel to Cuba to investigate the death of a translator.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: The Long Goodbye
programme.desc: The team searches for Jada, the woman Sam led to asylum in the United States four years ago, after she goes missing. Also, Kensi goes undercover with DEA Agent Talia Del Campo.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Defectors
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing teenage girl who is feared to have been recruited by a terrorist organization.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: While Deeks is under arrest and interrogated for the murder of his former partner, the team races to try and prove his innocence.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Cancel Christmas
programme.desc: When a suspected North Korean spy is poisoned and hit by a truck carrying Christmas trees, the team must search for who is responsible for smuggling spies into the country. Also, Deeks and Kensi try to find a way to include their mothers at Christmas.

programme.title: NCIS: Marine Down
programme.desc: Following her husband's wake, a widow receives a call from him saying he's alive.

programme.title: NCIS: Left for Dead
programme.desc: A woman who digs herself out of a grave after being buried alive comes to Gibbs attention.

programme.title: NCIS: Eye Spy
programme.desc: A naval officer, who was hired by an outside agency to test a product, is found murdered.

programme.title: NCIS: My Other Left Foot
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team investigate the discovery of a Marine's severed leg in a dumpster.

programme.title: NCIS: One Shot, One Kill
programme.desc: With the help of his agents, Gibbs must locate a sniper who is killing marine recruiters.

programme.title: NCIS: The Good Samaritan
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team hunt for a serial killer after three Naval officers are murdered.

programme.title: Family Guy: Baby Stewie
programme.desc: Stewie builds a DNA-altering machine that will allow him to remain smart forever, but the invention has the adverse effect and he instead transforms into what he should have always been an actual baby.

programme.title: Family Guy: Bri, Robot
programme.desc: Brian worries about the legacy he's leaving behind, so Stewie makes a robot duplicate as a living biography.

programme.title: Family Guy: Movin' in (Principal Shepherd's Song)
programme.desc: Principal Shepherd moves in with the Griffins after he is fired for fat-shaming Chris at school. Meanwhile, Brian sues Stewie for writing a series of children's books which portray him as an idiot.

programme.title: Family Guy: Send in Stewie, Please
programme.desc: Stewie gets sent to see his school's child psychologist, Dr. Cecil Pritchfield, for a surprising session, which causes Stewie to reveal major, never-before-told secrets about himself.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dog Bites Bear
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian get into a friendship-ending fight after Brian commits a terrible act to one of Stewie's beloved toys. Meanwhile, Peter refuses to wash his hand after meeting his favourite breakfast cereal mascot, Boo Berry.

programme.title: Family Guy: Switch the Flip
programme.desc: To help get Brian's life in order, Stewie and Brian swap bodies using a machine that Stewie invents, but chaos quickly ensues around Quahog when the machine goes haywire.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Woof of Wall Street
programme.desc: Brian convinces Stewie to teach him how to invest in the stock market after learning Stewie has a knack for making money from it. Meanwhile, Peter, Quagmire, Cleveland and Joe look after the Drunken Clam while Jerome is away.

programme.title: Family Guy: Big Trouble in Little Quahog
programme.desc: After Brian teases Stewie for being small, Stewie invents a shrinking machine that results in both of them shrinking to a microscopic size.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Alone
programme.desc: Marge takes a vacation from the family at Rancho Relaxo, leaving Homer by himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Lover
programme.desc: Bart plays a practical joke on Mrs. Krabapple by pretending to be an amorous pen pal.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Pig Trouble in Little Tina
programme.desc: Tina dissects a fetal pig in science class and things get spooky. Also, Bob and Linda do battle with a giant ball of ear wax.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Legends of the Mall
programme.desc: On a Belcher family trip to the mall, Tina is mistaken for a sleeping boy's girlfriend. Meanwhile, Gene and Louise are turned loose on motorized animals, Linda disrupts a book reading and Bob struggles to shop for acceptable pants.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Boys Just Wanna Have Fungus
programme.desc: Unable to afford a rare gourmet mushroom for a Burger of the Day, Bob and Gene jump into the cutthroat world of mushroom foraging. Meanwhile, Tina's powerful new prescription glasses lead her to believe she has a superpower.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Motor, She Boat
programme.desc: Tina and Bob participate in the Thundergirls father-daughter cardboard boat race and Tina tries to hide her feelings about Bob’s terrible boat-building skills. Meanwhile, Linda drags Louise and Gene to a fire station open house and overstays her welcome.

programme.title: Archer: Killing Utne
programme.desc: Malory hosts a dinner party for UN Intelligence Chairman Torvald Utne in an effort to get a new weapons contract for ISIS. Unfortunately, a group of rival assassins have targeted Mr. Utne for elimination.

programme.title: Archer: Honeypot
programme.desc: Malory's career is threatened when a sensitive videotape falls into the hands of a rogue (and roguish) Cuban agent, so she calls on Archer's expertise in seduction to turn the tables on her blackmailer.

programme.title: Archer: Skorpio
programme.desc: Archer must rescue Lana from the clutches of Skorpio, the infamous arms dealer. Meanwhile, Cyril fears not only for his girlfriend's life, but her succumbing to the seductive nature of Archer's heroics.

programme.title: Archer: Skytanic
programme.desc: When a bomb threat jeopardizes the maiden voyage of the luxury airship Excelsior, Archer and the ISIS crew must battle the clock (and each other) to avert disaster.

programme.desc: When experts discover a 500-year-old grave, they find mysterious red skulls, pointing to a shocking mass sacrifice; experts use the latest technology and state-of-the-art forensics to investigate what happened at this horrific site.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Journey to Enigma Island
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard venture to a set of islands that could have been the site of Viking landings in America, and using cutting-edge archaeological technology, they look for evidence of long-lost Viking ships.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Neanderthal Bigfoot Attack
programme.desc: When a close encounter with an enraged ape-like creature is caught on camera, experts investigate if it's evidence of a once-extinct Neanderthal specimen engineered by a nearby experimental research facility.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Capone's Escape Tunnels
programme.desc: Rob Nelson investigates rumors of a secret underground escape route used by the infamous gangster Al Capone. Washington State, Rob tries to uncover who or what built a vast landscape of earthen mounds in Washington State.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Tesla's Final Secrets
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla died before he finished a mysterious, earth-shattering invention, but the ground beneath his only remaining lab might hold clues. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns are the first to use cutting-edge tech to investigate Tesla's underground secrets.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Great Lakes Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ghosts of the Berlin Wall
programme.desc: Experts explore the mysterious abandoned ruins that were once behind the Berlin Wall, and these new investigations turn up discoveries that reveal the dark truths of East Germany and its terrifying secret police.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ancient Pyramid Origins
programme.desc: Explore the origins of ancient pyramids as experts question if they were independently constructed or perhaps the design of something more mysterious.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Japanese Treasure
programme.desc: Legend has it that Japanese soldiers buried a vast collection of valuable relics and gold in the Philippines during World War II. Follow treasure hunters as they search to discover if this mythical plunder is real or just a myth.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Top Secret Nazi UFOs
programme.desc: Investigating claims that the Nazis had developed a brand new flying craft at a secret research facility in Northern Germany and that the Americans and Russians stole this technology after the war.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mystery of the Turin Shroud
programme.desc: The Turin Shroud is believed to be proof of the existence of Jesus, but skeptics disagree. Follow experts as they explore this ancient relic to determine if the shroud is genuine, or one of the most elaborate hoaxes in history.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: American Monster: Flesh and Blood
programme.desc: Young parents Adriene and James Magee work hard to provide a stable life for their three small children in rural Louisiana. But underneath the idyllic scenes lurks a dark secret, culminating in a heinous double-murder at the hands of a loved-one.

programme.title: American Monster: Plus-One
programme.desc: When Melissa and Rob find love at a birthday BBQ, everything seems to have fallen into place. But as Rob works longer hours, Melissa is left with an uneasy feeling. When tensions flare not even the happiest of proposals can save them from devastation.

programme.title: American Monster: Second Chance
programme.desc: Joy and Fred are typical high-school sweethearts until a tragic work accident changes the course of their lives forever. As Joy tries to find a second shot at love, her past will refuse to let her go... and sets in motion a heart-breaking tragedy.

programme.title: American Monster: Life in Florida
programme.desc: Wealthy and glamorous 72-year-old widow Jean Schwarzkopf is determined not to give up on life and is soon a fixture on the Florida social scene. But when Jean's new friends are not all they seem her family is drawn into a dark world of crime and violence.

programme.title: American Monster: Nothing Can Stop Us
programme.desc: Tattoo artist Amber Andrews and snowboarder Brandon Duran have a tumultuous marriage. When love turns to venomous hate, a shocking secret breaks the surface and reveals a betrayal that leads to murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Ghost From the Past
programme.desc: Best friends Julie Marange and Kristin Dargis are like sisters. So, when Julie falls for Kristin's brother, George, it seems to be the perfect romance. But both soon realize that escaping the past takes more than love - and can lead to fatal consequences.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Betrayal in the Mountains
programme.desc: The discovery of the body of a young woman in the tree line of a popular camp site in the Rocky Mountains marks the beginning of a terrifying murder mystery.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death Brawl
programme.desc: A handsome marine lands the girl of his dreams. But the perils of their long distance love push these newlyweds to the edge. When Shari and Deon's romance misfires in a tragic accident - the collateral damage is deadly.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Other Side of the Tracks
programme.desc: When Ed Postma, a Florida truck driver with a bad boy reputation, meets single mom Jackie Rosser, sparks fly. But when Ed straightens out to become a family man, new bad boys are waiting, and the spark dies, taking another casualty as collateral damage.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Down the Hill
programme.desc: 13-year-old Abby Williams and 14-year-old Libby German go for a short walk on a popular hiking trail and then disappear. And then 13-year-old Dylan Redwine vanishes on Thanksgiving break, 2012, while visiting his dad in Vallecito, Colorado.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: New Mexico Desert Killings
programme.desc: When a young woman vanishes from a New Mexico convenience store, two detectives discover tracks in the dirt that may lead them to answers. After a second woman disappears, it's a race against time to stop a potential serial killer.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: In October 2016, after helping a friend fix his computer, 18-year-old tech prodigy, Sam Poss, takes off on foot and never returns home. Did the beloved teen run away? Was there an accident? Police work around the clock to find the truth.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: My Dearest Diary
programme.desc: When Angela and Ashley Hyke go missing one hot summer night and candles are found burning in their home, those close to them know that something is horribly wrong. The key to solving the mystery may lie in Angela's cryptic diary.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: When beautiful young mother Danielle Jennings is found strangled to death in her apartment, detectives immediately believe she knew her attacker -- until a witness comes forward with a ringer of a clue that leads them to an unthinkable monster.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Silent Killer
programme.desc: Diane Girts is found dead in the bathtub of her home adjoining her husband's funeral home, and nobody can determine exactly how she died. As the case unfolds, detectives will uncover troubling clues pointing to a cunning and dangerous killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery in Effingham County
programme.desc: A prominent family harboured a terrible secret that rocked a community.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery in Effingham County
programme.desc: A prominent family harboured a terrible secret that rocked a community.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Murder in the Chat Room
programme.desc: In the wake of a broken marriage, 28-year old Samantha Lezark's struggle to find love again has a fatal ending. Now, investigators must follow her digital trail through different chat rooms to uncover her killer.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Suburban Nightmare
programme.desc: A group of suburban teens invite a much-older, rougher young man into their inner circle. They're hoping for thrills and cash. But when these two worlds collide, the crashing result is a murder so vicious and gruesome it haunts the community to this day.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Fatal Impact
programme.desc: A farm foreman is killed in what looks like a deadly accident. The ATF, however, confirms this was no accident it was a bomb with an intended target. Trying to misdirect police, the killer is eventually brought down with the help of a little sunlight.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Nazi Killer Magic
programme.desc: It is the great untold story of World War Two. The role the Occult played in shaping and determining the outcome of the fight. Nazi Killer Magic reveals how esotericism and mysticism influenced Hitler's wartime commanders.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury

programme.title: Nazi Killer Magic
programme.desc: It is the great untold story of World War Two. The role the Occult played in shaping and determining the outcome of the fight. Nazi Killer Magic reveals how esotericism and mysticism influenced Hitler's wartime commanders.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Bombers
programme.desc: Go inside the most dominant and lethal military aircraft, from the bombers that won the War to the B-52, from the stealth B-2 to the most advanced and top secret bombers of the future.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Armor
programme.desc: An in-depth, action-packed look at the most advanced armor technologies, from body armor to heavy duty composites that make the Abrams tank the best protected and the most lethal vehicle on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Twin Capes Ferry

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: Summer Kitchen Restoration
programme.desc: Lauren and Dan own an amazing stone home in Montgomery County dating back to the 1850s which has a separate summer kitchen. The exterior is in great condition but the interior is crumbling.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1700s First Floor Restoration
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin is recruited by homeowners Scott and Rhonda to fully restore the first floor sunroom, living room and dining room of their 1700s stone home.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1803 Second Floor Overhaul
programme.desc: Carpenter Jeff Devlin heads to the home of Jodie and JP to check out the original second floor of their 1803 stone home. The space has been sectioned off over time, and the homeowners want a more cohesive master suite that evokes the home's history.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Original Kitchen Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is called on to renovate a dated kitchen believed to be in the same spot as the original one that was built in the 1800s. By restoring much of the kitchen's history, Jeff and team are able to bring in a classic farmhouse style to the home.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1790 Three-Room Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff meets Allen and Kathleen, a couple who wants him to restore three rooms in the original portion of their 1790 home. Jeff and his team dig into each space, uncovering a few unique original details and adding other historic features.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1740 Little House Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited to restore a 1740 stone home that sits behind couple Kelly and Rob's suburban 1990s home. They call it the "little house," and it sat right in the middle of the action of one of the most famous Revolutionary War battles.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Kitchen and Dining Room
programme.desc: A couple have just bought an historic stone home with portions built in the 1700s, 1800s, and 1990s. They want Jeff to look at their dining room, kitchen and sunroom. They want a more open floor plan, but Jeff will have to move stone walls.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1737 Entryway and Kitchen
programme.desc: Lisa and Tom ask Jeff to work on their 1737 stone home in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania. They ask him to address the first floor and the kitchen. Jeff and his team bring unique 1800s elements into the entryway room and give the kitchen an 1800s overhaul.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1690s Living Room Restoration
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited by a couple to do a true restoration of the original living room in their 1690s stone home. They also want to enclose the attached vestibule to create a mudroom. They want it to blend in with the rest of the home with stone walls.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1751 Two-Floor Restoration
programme.desc: A mother and daughter bring Jeff in to restore two rooms in the original portion of their 1751 stone home. Jeff and his team give the dining room a slightly formal farmhouse feel. Then they achieve a rustic and refined style in the bathroom.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Everything's Bigger and Better in Texas
programme.desc: Discover a Forth Worth Tex Mex Burrito almost as big as the state of Texas itself.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: California Dreamin'
programme.desc: Noah is California dreamin' for the Golden State's best carnival eats. He sets things on fire with a Deep Pit BBQ dinner, gets groovy with the Green Goddess and celebrates with Birthday Cake Crepes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grill Bill
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Great Lakes to visit the Barry County Fair.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fry Harder
programme.desc: Noah Cappe soaks up the California sunshine while enjoying some wacky West Coast treats at the San Diego County Fair in Del Mar, California.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There Will Be Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe pigs out at the Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla., where all-American classics make an appearance in the stuffed crust bacon-za, but it's the peanut butter pork donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mocktail
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes loco for Sunshine State snacks at the Manatee County Fair in Palmetto, Fla. There's lots of ooey-gooey goodness in the pizza supremo burger and the ulti-melt burger, but it's the sandia loca that has Noah flipping out.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Childhood Favorites

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Food Truck Frenzy
programme.desc: Whether it's mouthwatering burgers, tacos with a twist, or delicious desserts, there's a food truck for just about anything you're craving.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: The Dish On Charlotte
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood get their southern food tour rolling in a growing city with an emerging food scene rooted in tradition: Charlotte, North Carolina! Their first stop is at Brooks' Sandwich House.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: The New South
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood are all about mixing old traditions with new flavors in the mountain town of Asheville, North Carolina. Nestled in the Appalachian Mountains, Rutledge and Damaris discover hip, true-to-the-region cooking.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Slumber Party
programme.desc: When Bobby's daughter Sophie has a sleepover it can only mean one thing... dad's in the kitchen cooking up brunch for everyone! This fun and tasty menu starts with an apple pie oatmeal with bruleed crust that's sure to wake up your taste buds.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch on the Go
programme.desc: Bobby creates a quick, simple and delicious Brunch-on-the-Go menu.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch in Bloom
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay prepares a garden fresh menu using his favorite fruits, vegetables and herbs like strawberry waffles with lemon curd cream, an open faced omelet with herb cream cheese topped with smoked salmon and grilled asparagus.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bread Lovers' Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes an essential element of brunch, bread, and makes it the star of every dish on his inventive menu from croque Madame bread pudding with herb-crusted tomatoes to a simple pull-apart cinnamon bread and a gazpacho bloody Maria.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked, Stuffed and Smothered
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon devours a delicious dumpling-inspired pork and shrimp burger and an elevated pub food classic. In Shreveport, La., a wood-fired pizza is topped with spicy roast chicken and sweet corn.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bayou Barbecue and Saucy Skillets
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Las Vegas, Nev., with a skillet full of pork belly chili and a mega-pancake that's the ultimate collision of apple pie and brunch.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Wild Smoke and Fiery Burgers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon finds a spicy burger that ignites a four-alarm fire, and a chorizo-pineapple burger sings a perfect harmony of sweet and heat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 89er Days/ Puno Strawberry Festival
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe heads to Oklahoma to pig out on a giant Texas tenderloin sandwich. Then, he heads to Virginia for a strawberry pizza.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Rock 'n' Roll to Red River
programme.desc: Noah Cappe discovers that cheddar chimneys make him twist and shout at Burlington’s Sound of Music Festival and feels right at home at the Red River Valley Fair with the redneck taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Fertile Fields to the Red River Valley
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off in Polk County, Minnesota where he goes local with the North Woods Sandwich and Barbe-chos, and feels right at home at the Red River Valley Fair with the Redneck Taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Royals and the Red River City
programme.desc: Noah begins his journey at the Royal Winter Fair in Toronto, Canada, where he says "yes, cheese" to the blue balsamic. Later, he ends his culinary adventure at the State Fair of Louisiana with the sweet Not Yo' Average Nachos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Freak Show of Funnel Cakes

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Say Cheese

programme.title: What'd You Miss?
programme.desc: Bloomberg TV's flagship markets program, providing key insights, analysis and context at the market close. It's a counterintuitive, highly intelligent look at the markets that misses absolutely nothing.

programme.title: Greg Kelly This Week

programme.title: Brad Meltzer's Decoded: Secret Presidential Codes
programme.desc: The team investigates the secret presidential codes of Thomas Jefferson and how they may be partially responsible for the death of one of the world's greatest explorers, Meriwether Lewis.

programme.title: Nostradamus: Prophet of Doom
programme.desc: He lived in an age of superstition and magic, and believed he could tell the future. Here is an in-depth look at Nostradamus' prophetic visions. He is believed to have predicted the French Revolution, the moon landing, and the space shuttle disaster.

programme.title: JFK Declassified: Tracking Oswald: The Russian Network
programme.desc: CIA veteran Bob Baer shifts his focus to Moscow and delves deeper into the possible connections between Oswald and the Russian government. A former KGB officer provides shocking testimony that shakes up the investigation.

programme.title: Satan's Doctor: Felix Kersten

programme.title: Secret Access: Air Force One

programme.title: Patton: A Genius for War
programme.desc: A profile of the tough-as-nails military leader General George S. Patton, recalls his years at West Point, first taste of battle in World War I, and successes in North Africa and Europe during World War II. Included is the downside of his record.

programme.title: Vietnam in HD: The Beginning (1964-1965)

programme.title: Vietnam in HD: Search & Destroy (1966-1967)

programme.desc: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert, and Luna is determined to make it the greatest experience ever.

programme.title: The Loud House: Dance Dance Resolution/ A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: Lincoln's sisters accidentally land him four dates for the Sadie Hawkins dance at school. When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

programme.title: Tooned In: Riddle Me This! Joisy v Malakai v Paige
Breadwinners: Movie Ducks/ Don't Feed the Duckosaurs
programme.desc: Steven Quackberg wants to make a movie about the Breadwinners. Unfortunately, he doesn't want to make it with the Breadwinners. Later, SwaySway and Buhdeuce get lost in duckosaur country where they're being stalked by a vicious D-Rex.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Trash Bandit/ Eat At Pumpers
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce get trapped inside the Swamp Pad by an ultra-belligerent raccoon, who has an insatiable lust for their trash. Later, SwaySway and Buhdeuce help Pumpers promote the diner by making a commercial jingle.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Flock Collecting/ Bye Bye Booty
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce get into the hobby of rock collecting, only to discover that they are the ones being collected. Buhdeuce attempts to get his butt back after it detaches itself because of overuse.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Wolf Head Bread/ Rock n' Roar
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce want to impress T-Midi by delivering him the rarest bread in all the Bread Mines: Wolf Head Bread. SwaySway and Buhdeuce help their rock idol get his career back on track.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Sneeze the Day/ Tooth Fairy Ducks
programme.desc: Buhdeuce gets a cold and then gives it to the Bread Maker, which causes his magic to go haywire. After accidentally taking the Tooth Fairy out of action, SwaySway and Buhdeuce have to level up into Tooth Fairy Ducks.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Abra Catastrophe
programme.desc: It's the one year anniversary of Timmy having Cosmo and Wanda as his Godparents.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Winning Attitude
programme.desc: Izzy is determined to win a big race with the help of her Special Olympics athlete cousin, Lily. After Lily misses a training session and Izzy rejects more help, her sportsmanship is put to the test.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Bo Bo Business/ Blunder Party
programme.desc: After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Croaked!/ New Haunts
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog. Then, when Ronnie Anne forgoes a family Halloween tradition for a 'cool' party, she learns 'cool' doesn't always mean 'fun'.

programme.title: The Loud House: Cover Girls/ Save the Date
programme.desc: All 10 of Lincoln's sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day. Bobby and Lori go on a double date with Lincoln and Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Fair to Remember/ Snow Bored
programme.desc: When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Big Bro Theodore/ No Putts, No Glory
programme.desc: When Theodore mistakenly thinks he's the oldest brother, he tries to be a better role model for Alvin and Simon.Alvin tricks Theodore into believing he's great at mini golf which backfires when Theo signs up for a tournament.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Gift/ Theo Knows Best
programme.desc: Theodore gives Dave an ugly handmade vest for his birthday and insists he wear it to an upcoming business meeting. When Theodore finds a winning lottery ticket, everyone has their own ideas on how the money should be spent.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Belly of the Beast/ Moon Farm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb construct a mechanical shark. The boys take a cow to the moon in order to test a theory on the best tasking ice cream.

programme.title: The Owl House: Wing It Like Witches
programme.desc: Not your average underdog story.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Seventh Wheel
programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Parker Plays: S'nailed It
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Return of the Rogue Rabbit/ Live and Let Drive
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz breaks a rogue animal agent out of high security prison and Perry must go to the glamorous Duchy of Montevillebad to stop Doof from winning the Grand Prix.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Raging Bully/ Lights, Candace, Action!
programme.desc: Phineas is challenged to a duel by the local bully and enters the ring for a thumb wrestling competition. Then Candace gets her chance at fame until Phineas and Ferb enter as directors.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems

programme.title: The Owl House: Young Blood, Old Souls

programme.title: The Owl House: Understanding Willow

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muirahara Woods

programme.desc: When Alex's younger brother, Aaron, shows up at Seattle Grace-Mercy West with a hernia, it's up to Alex to get Bailey's approval for his pro bono surgery. Matters are further complicated when Alex's past secrets are revealed.

programme.title: The Closer: Out of Focus
programme.desc: When a paparazzi photographer appears to have killed himself by jumping out of a hotel window, Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson is called in to investigate. Fritz is getting calls from a female colleague, which makes Brenda jealous.

programme.desc: A case goes sideways at trial when defense attorney Linda Rothman is able to destroy Det. Amy Syke's credibility on the stand. Helping Rothman as a defense investigation is Amy's old nemesis, Mark Hickman.

programme.desc: Major Crimes finds a heavy body forty feet up a tree surrounded by loose pot when Dr. Morales shows up to the crime scene with his father. Meanwhile, Julio Sanchez works to obtain legal guardianship of Mark Jarvis while Andy Flynn prepares a surprise.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Sharon's son, Ricky, comes home for a surprise visit while Major Crimes investigates what looks like the 'follow home' murder of a retired LAPD fraud detective, who may have been murdered for an arrest she made decades ago.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Intersection
programme.desc: As the war between bikes and cars escalates, Acting Assistant Chief Fritz Howard deploys Major Crimes to solve a tragic hit and run. Lt. Provenza, frustrated by the never-ending contest to succeed Russell Traylor, contemplates retirement.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Shockwave
programme.desc: A murder investigation turns explosive while Captain Sharon Raydor duels with Chief Winnie Davis for control of her case as she and her squad try to determine if they are dealing with a terrorist.

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Bernie Madoff: Most Hated Man (Part 1)
programme.desc: Bernie Madoff was a legend on Wall Street. But he would eventually confess to his sons that he had been living a lie; that this secret fund was nothing more than a multi-billion dollar fraud, the biggest Ponzi scene ever.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Bernie Madoff: Who Else Knew? (Part 2)
programme.desc: The news of Bernie Madoff’s arrest sent shockwaves around the world. Investigators were about to unravel a scheme that went back decades and involved several loyal employees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Church Lady
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery in a small town church sends investigators on a search for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Inside Pocket
programme.desc: An insurance agent is shot execution style in his office in broad daylight but the killer leaves no fingerprints and there is no murder weapon found at the scene. Then, investigators discover a critical clue invisible to the naked eye.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Last Gasp
programme.desc: After a young mom is found brutally murdered in her home, investigators find startling clues on her cell phone that could lead to her killer.

programme.desc: 17-year-old Brittanee Drexel suddenly disappears from spring break in Myrtle Beach. She leaves a friend’s hotel and is never seen again. But the case comes alive when twisted and disturbing details start to emerge from a prison cell.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Killer Affair

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Back on Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin and his crew turn their trommel up to double speed hoping to get the most gold from Montana's historic Birdseye mine. Dirty water and ground that's not producing challenge the crew, forcing Dave to call an audible at the last minute.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Boundary Blowout
programme.desc: On the scent of big gold, Turin and his crew test the limits of the landowner's patience when they cut a fence to access ground on his cattle grazing land. Dave investigates another promising hard rock mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Blue Room Bonanza

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: All In

programme.title: Gold Rush: Million Dollar Season

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Mountain of Gold

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: George Washington Rye

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Ultra High Proof

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Amateurs compete to make absinthe.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: High Proof Cherry Bounce

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Pot-Still Vodka

programme.title: Rock the Block: Rock the Living Rooms
programme.desc: The competition continues in week two as the teams tackle the first floor living spaces. From fancy doors to marble floors, each duo's unique strategy and design style flourishes, giving guest judge Page Turner a difficult task when choosing a winner.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: Four Weeks Until Baby
programme.desc: A couple's renovation dreams were dashed when they were forced to spend their budget on mold issues after moving. Now they have a baby on the way, and Jasmine has four weeks to renovate their kitchen, dining room and give them a much-needed nursery.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: I Don't Want to be Project Manager Anymore
programme.desc: A couple set out to create their dream home, but their skill level ran out and they have a million projects they can't finish. Jasmine steps in to turn their half-finished kitchen, bathroom and backyard into spaces where the family can relax and connect.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: Time to Hand It Over to the Pros

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: The Toilet Is Still in the Hallway

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: Behind the Tarp

programme.title: Good Bones: Duplex Remodel Is Double the Trouble
programme.desc: After purchasing a duplex for $15,000, Karen and Mina get to work turning the cramped space with two sides into a single family home. Re-imaging the floor plan is easy -- it's staying on budget that's a challenge with this project.

programme.title: Good Bones: Big House, Big Potential
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are excited to be back on Sanders Street to check out an old house they got a bargain on. This already huge project comes with age-related issues like rotten wood, antiquated windows and many hidden treasures common in older homes.

programme.title: Good Bones: Facelift for a Tiny Victorian
programme.desc: Mina and Karen buy a tiny, Victorian-style home in need of a serious facelift. Not only is the house small, it has a funky layout with non-functional spaces, forcing the girls to build an addition on the back while trying to stay on budget.

programme.title: Good Bones: Risky Reno With Historic Charm

programme.title: Good Bones: Budget-Busting Victorian
