programme.title: Forbidden History: Search for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Mysterious evidence on Mt. Ararat could be the long-lost remains of Noah's Ark, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate if these discoveries are hard proof of the Biblical legend.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls: New Evidence
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of a Desolate Evil
programme.desc: Evidence of an unspeakable evil in a set of Parisian buildings and an alien Stonehenge with a sinister purpose are now abandoned ruins; experts investigate the secrets of these dark structures to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Alien Stonehenge
programme.desc: An alien Stonehenge with a sinister purpose, an eerie building filled with strange labyrinths, and an endless concrete track in the middle of nowhere are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Pompeii: After Apocalypse
programme.desc: The latest scientific investigations reveals the untold story of how a cataclysmic eruption transformed an entire region.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Legend of the Nazca Lines
programme.desc: The Nazca Lines are the mysterious wonders of a long-gone civilization, and today, experts are using cutting-edge technology to investigate the secrets of the mummies and treasures found in these bizarre ruins to finally reveal their true purpose.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Lost Relic of the Ice Age
programme.desc: An Ice Age relic found in a mysterious cave is evidence of prehistoric humans' connection to the supernatural.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Treasures of the Warrior King
programme.desc: The treasure trove of Sutton Hoo is one of the great discoveries from medieval Europe, and its mysteries conceal the secrets of a lost world; cutting-edge archaeology and an international expedition reveal the truth behind the riches of a warrior king.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Wild West
programme.desc: The gunfight at Tombstone's OK Corral turned Wyatt Earp into an American folk hero, and to find what really happened here, experts use the newest tech to discover what caused the fatal shootout and what it reveals about the dark secrets of the Wild West.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries in the Alien Desert
programme.desc: The Nazca Lines in Peru are mysterious giant symbols; hundreds of alien looking drawings created more than 1000 years ago. Learn why their creators made vast images in the desert that only make sense from the air.

programme.title: Unearthed: Terror in the Torture Tower
programme.desc: Decoding the mysteries behind iconic structures and monuments around the world.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures
programme.desc: The treasures of Ramses II are found at Abu Simbel, a giant temple carved into a desert cliff over 3,000 years ago, and new discoveries at this marvel reveal the secrets of ancient Egypt's greatest pharaoh.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of Seahenge
programme.desc: A prehistoric megastructure emerges from the sands of an English shore that could reveal lost mysteries to the Bronze Age; using pioneering technology and 3-D imaging analysis, experts investigate and uncover dark, ancient rituals once performed here.

programme.title: Unearthed: Sumerian Pyramid of Death
programme.desc: Deep in the Iraqi desert, the world's only ziggurat towers over the remains of the first civilization ever known in human history; armed with pioneering satellite imagery, experts investigate the dark mysteries behind this massive, ancient structure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Answering the Call
programme.desc: When a brush fire is reported in rural Winchester, TN, first responders are horrified to find the body of young Megan Sharpton at the center of the blaze.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Stuck in the Middle
programme.desc: When Paula Cardwell returns from running errands, she finds her 20-year-old daughter, Anna Catherine, lying dead on the kitchen floor. The small town of Wetumpka, Alabama, is left stunned and determined to find the devil in their midst.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: The Tuxedo King
programme.desc: When a prominent businessman is kidnapped from a diner parking lot for a multimillion dollar ransom, the NYPD races against the clock to find him alive. Meanwhile, a New York Post reporter uncovers a career making scoop- that could come at a fatal price.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Scared Silent
programme.desc: When Marshall Dent goes missing on Christmas Eve, the Native American community of Shawnee, Oklahoma bands together. After weeks of searching, Marshall is found in a shallow grave on sacred ground, leaving authorities scrambling to find the killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Nicole Addimando
programme.desc: A young mother admits to shooting her partner, a popular gymnastics coach, but says it was self-defence; the death divides a community.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Jenner Beach Murders
programme.desc: A Christian couple's weekend getaway takes a tragic turn when they are found murdered on a northern California beach. Satanic imagery found nearby leads local Sheriff's deputies on a manhunt complicated by a cagey killer who covered his tracks.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Exposed
programme.desc: Three young girls meet a new friend online. Like other boys in the chat rooms, he's around their age, friendly, and flirtatious. Months later his demeanor shifts, trapping the girls in a vicious game from which they can't escape.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Nicole Addimando
programme.desc: A young mother admits to shooting her partner, a popular gymnastics coach, but says it was self-defence; the death divides a community.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Jenner Beach Murders
programme.desc: A Christian couple's weekend getaway takes a tragic turn when they are found murdered on a northern California beach. Satanic imagery found nearby leads local Sheriff's deputies on a manhunt complicated by a cagey killer who covered his tracks.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Swipe Right for Murder
programme.desc: When Ashley Pegram goes missing after meeting a man through a dating app, the race to find her focuses on her internet admirer. Detectives soon discover she is caught up in a nightmarish trap set by an online predator with murder on his mind.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Death Before Marriage
programme.desc: Carol has been waiting 25 years to marry the love of her life, Jack Parkes. Six weeks away from their wedding in Kennedy Township, PA, she finds him shot in the head in their living room. The murder will destroy her life and uncover dark family secrets.

programme.title: Wives With Knives: The Quiet Storm
programme.desc: Teenagers Tamara and Leo are forced to marry when Tamara gets pregnant but the strain of raising a family rips them apart. Tamara falls for a childhood friend, Marvin but the romance turns ugly when he starts abusing her and she fights back with a knife.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Caught in Her Crosshairs
programme.desc: After a string of failed relationships, Veronica thinks single dad, Russ, is the answer to her prayers. As long as his daughter, Kimberly, doesn't get in the way. As their family grows, so does this stepmother's rage and everyone is in her crosshairs.

programme.title: Deadly Affairs: To Catch a Cheat
programme.desc: Sexy Russian co-ed, Irina Zadornov falls for an aspiring lawyer, but she doesn't know he's still hot for an old flame. And later, when a Texas heartthrob, with a rotating slate of lovers, goes missing, investigators are left with no shortage of questions.

programme.title: Cold Hearted: Blinding Fantasy
programme.desc: They say opposites attract, that's how Navy man Cory Voss meets his wife Cat. When money runs dry she seeks the attention of a seemingly wealthier man. But when Cat finds out he isn't who he says the Voss family falls apart.

programme.title: Deadly Women: If Looks Could Kill
programme.desc: Beauty is only skin deep; scratch the surface and you could find an ugly soul. A gorgeous girl preys on an elderly man, a cabaret star performs a killer finale, and a farmer's wife harvests husbands.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Home Sweet Hell
programme.desc: A suspicious gun store robbery in Maryland piques the interest of the ATF, and ignites an investigation into violence, arson, and murder. As detectives zero in on the suspect, they find themselves face-to-face with an unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: A Deadly Divorce
programme.desc: An illicit affair between a bank executive and his secretary turns deadly when the soon-to-be ex-wife uncovers their romance.

programme.title: If I Should Die: Saint or Strangler
programme.desc: Eighteen-year-old Hae Min Lee vanishes one day after school, only to be discovered strangled in a park a month later. Her diaries offer a chronicle of her love life, and guide police to a shocking arrest still highly contested to this day.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Father and Son
programme.desc: From the start a man maintained the death of his ex-wife was a suicide but to her son it was always murder and he was determined to have his father face a jury of his peers.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Bedside Manner
programme.desc: Stephanie is a former beauty queen and always dreamed of a high end lifestyle. When she is appointed as Dr. Stephens' head nurse, she is quickly charmed by both his charm and bank account and will stop at nothing to get the glamorous life she wants.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: The Girls of Belmont Ave
programme.desc: In the heart of Richmond, VA, a love triangle tears apart a group of gay girlfriends- and leads to brutal murder. Investigating this senseless and sadistic killing, detectives uncover a deadly plot fueled by lies, gossip, and a thirst for revenge.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Master Key Murder
programme.desc: The charming town of Macon, GA panics when Mercer Law grad Lauren Giddings is murdered on campus. Detectives uncover multiple suspects with motive and means. But only one person in the group is sadistic enough to kill.

programme.desc: There are many ways to leave your lover one of those ways is dead.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: The Krays
programme.desc: English gangsters and twin brothers Ronald and Reginald Kray were the foremost perpetrators of organized crime in the East End of London during the '50s and '60s.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Charlie Richardson
programme.desc: Charlie Richardson was the head of the notorious Richardson gang who built up a lucrative empire by extortion, fraud and torture. Enter Gerald MacArthur who began a painstaking investigation at a time when corruption was rife in the Metropolitan Police.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Heroes

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: An Uphill Battle
programme.desc: Lifelong Mainers bought their Belgrade cabin in 1987 and have maintained it over the years, but the list of needed repairs continues to grow. Chase and the team give the camp much-needed life by rebuilding its front wall and replacing the heating system.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To The Ferry
programme.desc: The team returns to the Norfolk, VA, ferry to get the large items that were left behind, including a crow's nest and staircase.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: My Life Is in Your Hands
programme.desc: Three new couples challenge the Alaskan elements. Mike and Kathleen Kondus build atop a windy tundra, first-time builders Mike and Teresa Oldenkamp construct a complex cabin and Paige Drobny and Cody Strathe create a dog-training facility on haunted land.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Life of Near Misses
programme.desc: Paige and Cody realize they don't have the correct insulation for their log walls. Kathleen and Mike's team get dangerously high up to install the ridge beam. Mike and Teresa begin work on their floor, but discover the joists are not evenly spaced.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Overload
programme.desc: Mike and Kathleen move to interior work, but the remote location is still slow with progress. At Paige and Cody's site, mechanical failures prevent the project from finishing before dog sled season. As Mike and Teresa build higher, it gets more dangerous.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Absolutely Insane
programme.desc: The Konduses fight the rain and shattered window panes deep in the White Mountains. Mike and Teresa's team gets stuck on slippery scaffolding 19 feet in the air while Paige and Cody's build stalls thanks to a material ordering snafu near the deadline.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Gonna Be Plush
programme.desc: It's a race to the finish as Paige and Cody wrap up before dog racing season in Cantwell while Mike and Kathleen lose all their help deep in the White Mountains. Meanwhile, the Oldenkamps struggle with the challenges of working on a grain-bin-style cabin.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaskan Glacier
programme.desc: Alaskan adventure guide Don Lee is building a remote survival cabin on top of a glacier where no man has stepped before. But in an area plagued with avalanches and unpredictable weather, this fearless bushman needs to time his construction perfectly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin Wanderlust
programme.desc: A young cabin builder creates a one-of-a-kind cabin in upstate New York during the harsh winter months. Due to the new and complicated design, the crew must adapt to the environment, work efficiently and leave no room for mistakes.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Coastal Maine
programme.desc: Jason and Crystal always wanted an escape in the middle of Maine's secluded coastline for their family to unplug and enjoy nature. With the help of a small group of friends, they set their sights on building a 320-square-foot cabin in just 12 days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Pittsburgh, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Pittsburgh for creative eats and a five-pound sandwich loaded with meat, cheese, fries and coleslaw.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boise, ID
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy, it goes by the name of Demon's Delight.

programme.title: Good Eats: Frozen Cache
programme.desc: Join host Alton Brown as he elevates the humble home freezer from its usual role as a dumping ground for leftovers and surplus into a powerhouse for proper food preservation.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tender Is the Pork
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown thinks he's cracked the code to true 'cue: brined pork, a flower pot, a trashcan, hardwood smoke and a lot of patience, resulting in a delicious Pulled Pork.

programme.title: Good Eats: Crustacean Nation IV: Crawfish
programme.desc: Alton Brown discovers the sustainable alternative to lobster, the crawfish.

programme.title: Good Eats: Use Your Noodle 5: Asian Noodles
programme.desc: Alton Brown investigates the culinary possibilities of Asian noodles.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quito
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the diverse culinary classics of Ecuador's capital city, Quito. The urban cuisine satisfies stomachs with fried pork and potato cakes, fresh ceviche, sugar-coated roasted peanuts, fish soup and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern looks at the diverse and monumental eats that define Washington, DC. Full of vibrant communities, DC boasts gastronomy that includes local oysters, Ethiopian chicken stew, spicy Chinese stir-fry and chilli-smothered sausages.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Louisville, KY, which boasts one of the most eclectic food scenes in the country. He digs in to Southern favorites with an Asian twist, fried chicken served with a fiery sauce and comfort food for the modern era.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Memphis
programme.desc: Andrew visits Memphis and makes stops at some of the city's most beloved barbecue joints. Then, he drops by one of America's most iconic soul food restaurants and visits a joint where Italian and Southern comfort food are combined.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Glasgow
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the culinary scene of Glasgow, Scotland, which is just as diverse as the city's landscape. From macaroni pies to venison haggis, the whimsical curiosity of the people is reflected in the iconic dishes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Big Island
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Hawaii's Big Island to take in its laid-back cuisine. From ancient traditions like lau lau and opakapaka fish to new traditions like the loco moco and huli chicken, he dives deep into the island's food culture.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bay Area
programme.desc: California's East Bay area is a thriving multi-ethnic community. Andrew Zimmern highlights the culinary hot spots where Chinese Dim Sum, Indian Pani Puri, American Soul food and Mexican tacos are being served up in traditional style.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the boardwalk indulgences of the Jersey Shore. From sticky-sweet saltwater taffy, to slices of tomato pie and Italian subs, the Jersey Shore's culinary scene is a carnival for the taste buds.

programme.title: Good Eats: Curious Yet Tasty Avocado Experiments
programme.desc: Although the avocado is best known for its staring roll in guacamole, this multifaceted culinary actor can also take on rolls usually played by eggs, butter, and even shortening.

programme.title: Good Eats: A Pie in Every Pocket
programme.desc: Alton uncovers the past and present of the handy and tasty pocket pie with fillings such as curry mango, chocolate and beef stew, a necessity for our culture on the go.

programme.title: Good Eats: My Pod
programme.desc: The rare vanilla pod grows on an orchid that can only be pollinated one day a year and contains many flavours and aromas.

programme.title: Good Eats: Flat is Beautiful III: Flounder
programme.desc: Alton fishes, filets and feasts on a selection of flounder dishes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Shell Game IV (Scallops)
programme.desc: Tales of a monster scallop send Alton traveling to a small town in Maine to investigate. After meeting with the nervous locals, he sets sail with Capt. Squint upon his house boat, the Okra where he's forced to cook a whole lot of scallop dishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Smoked
programme.desc: Roger Mooking criss-crosses America to count down 15 of the very best steaks, wings, Reubens and more- all made even better with glorious smoke. From salt-cured country ham to smoked fish chowder, bacon bourbon rib-eye steak to smoky s'mores pancakes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Saucy
programme.desc: Roger Mooking scours the U.S. to find 15 of the best dishes that are all about the sauce. There's sticky toffee pudding, super spicy wings, a fondue burger, drunken scallops and even chocolate plus barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Monster Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to Hoodoo Brown Barbeque in Ridgefield, CT, where owner Cody Sperry serves up monster-sized meaty masterpieces. Cody serves up "outlaw barbeque," a mashup of styles and traditions with smoke pork butts, pork ribs, pork belly and beef.

programme.title: Movie: Man on a Ledge

programme.title: Movie: The Assassination of Jesse James by the Coward Robert Ford

programme.title: VICE: El Darién & Out of Sight
programme.desc: Thousands of migrants to the US face a grueling 60-mile hike along the Columbia-Panama border through one of the world’s most dangerous jungles. The police-worn body camera has yet to fulfill its promise as a silver bullet against police brutality.

programme.title: Shameless: DNR
programme.desc: Lip has a million projects going on, and Frank is one of them. Liam is forced to watch Frank, so the two of them embark on a journey to take down Liam's classmate in an effort to get Liam into STEM school.

programme.title: City on a Hill: Bill Russell's Bedsheets
programme.desc: When an assistant U.S. attorney overdoses and ends up left for dead, Decourcy Ward suspects Jackie Rohr's involvement. Jackie, in turn, goes after the BPD for a questionable drug arrest at Braxton Summit, a federal housing project.

programme.title: Movie: Relic
programme.desc: When an elderly lady goes missing, her daughter and granddaughter travel to their country home to find her. She reappears in a disoriented state and the women fear a sinister presence is taking over.

programme.title: City on a Hill: Bill Russell's Bedsheets
programme.desc: When an assistant U.S. attorney overdoses and ends up left for dead, Decourcy Ward suspects Jackie Rohr's involvement. Jackie, in turn, goes after the BPD for a questionable drug arrest at Braxton Summit, a federal housing project.

programme.title: Shameless: DNR
programme.desc: Lip has a million projects going on, and Frank is one of them. Liam is forced to watch Frank, so the two of them embark on a journey to take down Liam's classmate in an effort to get Liam into STEM school.

programme.title: Movie: Becky
programme.desc: Rebellious teenager Becky is brought on a weekend getaway to a lake house by her father in an effort to reconnect after her mother's death. The trip takes a turn when a group of convicts on the run, suddenly invade the lake house.

programme.title: Movie: True History of the Kelly Gang
programme.desc: Notorious 19th century outlaw Ned Kelly recounts the tales of his life, from his hardscrabble upbringing to his gang's attempts to outrun the authorities.

programme.title: Movie: Along Came a Spider
programme.desc: A detective and forensic psychologist investigates the kidnapping of a senator's daughter by a schizophrenic psychopath.

programme.title: Movie: The Legend of Bagger Vance
programme.desc: Desus Nice and The Kid Mero sound off on pop culture, politics, sports and more, now coming to you from their own homes. The hosts welcome Delroy Lindo.

programme.title: Movie: The Babe
programme.desc: A biographical look at the career and troubled personal life of baseball legend Babe Ruth.

programme.title: Movie: Twilight
programme.desc: A teen yearning for belonging and understanding moves in with her father in Washington State. She soon falls in love with an enigmatic boy at school, who turns out to be a vampire. They find themselves drawn to each other despite their differences.

programme.title: Movie: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: When a fashion-driven sorority girl is dumped by her boyfriend, she decides to follow him to law school. Harvard doesn't know what to do when Elle and her dog take the Ivy League institution by storm.

programme.title: Movie: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: A young woman invites three of her mother's past suitors to her upcoming wedding so she can learn which one may be her father.

programme.title: Movie: Southside With You
programme.desc: Lawyer Michelle Robinson agrees to go to a community event with a young law firm associate named Barack Obama. On an eventful, day-long date, he attempts to woo her. Throughout the day, they find that they have much more in common than they thought.

programme.title: Movie: The Call
programme.desc: A 911 operator takes a call from a young girl who's has been abducted. She must use all her quick thinking in order to save the girl and make sure the man responsible is brought to justice.

programme.title: Movie: Fantasy Island
programme.desc: A horror adaptation of the popular 1970s TV show about a magical island resort.

programme.title: The Luminaries: The Old Moon is the Young Moon's Arms
programme.desc: Anna is tried for murder. New evidence reveals a connection between Lauderback and Crosbie Wells.

programme.title: Men in Kilts: A Roadtrip With Sam and Graham: Scotland by Land, Air and Sea
programme.desc: Sam and Graham share (and show off) Scotland's rolling hills, epic mountain ranges and jagged shorelines, natural wonders sure to make any viewer's jaw drop.

programme.title: The Great Mother
programme.desc: Follow Nora Sandigo, legal guardian to over 2000 US-citizen children of undocumented immigrants, as she sacrifices everything to keep American-born children with their undocumented parents.

programme.title: Movie: The Last Shift
programme.desc: After 38 years in the fast food industry, Stanley is ready for retirement but must first train his replacement.

programme.title: The Gloaming: Hell's Black Grammar
programme.desc: Molly discovers a mysterious symbol that leads her to track down Freddie. A powerful cabal is funded by a Councillor's election campaign in return for her influence with a business deal.

programme.title: Movie: Scary Movie 3
programme.desc: A girl investigates crop circles and video tapes while preventing an alien invasion.

programme.title: Movie: Alpha Dog

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: You Are Not the Tooth Fairy/ Busted Bridesmaid Dress
programme.desc: Woman sues for son's dental bill; woman sues over friend's wedding expenses.

programme.desc: Moms argue over improper use of lemonade stand profits. A man sues his ex-girlfriend over a broken lease.

programme.title: Protection Court: Bring in the Sheriff
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Smash and Dash/ Don't Drink That Water
programme.desc: A car is damaged during repossession; caterer drinks tainted water at a party.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Redmon Jr. vs. Patterson
programme.desc: Two young adults confront the man who left them and ask him to take a paternity test.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Ashley vs. Bullock
programme.desc: A 56-year-old man wonders if he could be the father of a 28-year-old woman from Omaha, NE.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Cousins are in court over a car sale. Parties dispute who is at fault for a car accident. A woman sues ex-friends for crashing her car; the defendant and his family can't believe their friend is so concerned with her car and not their well-being.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff has always considered the defendant to be her dad, even though she knows he may not be her biological father, so she has petitioned the court for a DNA test to learn the truth.

programme.title: Judge Jerry

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA: My Brother Won't Take the Test So I Will
programme.desc: While Lydia and Jaquan were hooking up, they would constantly accuse each other of cheating. They split up early last year and Lydia revealed to Jaquan that she was pregnant. Now, Jaquan's new girlfriend has him thinking he isn't the father.

programme.title: Maury: I'm Back to Prove John Fathered Both of My Kids
programme.desc: Robert has been denying his daughter because he is not sure if he really is her father, only the DNA test will tell! Megan is back to prove that John is the father of both her kids, but he says the youngest one looks nothing like him.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: One Night Stand With A...
programme.desc: Torian is well known professional 'Twerker.' His exploits caught the eye of another man named Darnell, who is obsessed with Torian. Quay can't stand her brother's wife. Jasmine met Logan online but he didn't tell her about his girlfriend, Kiarra.

programme.title: Maury: Will DNA Prove my Husband Has Two Grown Daughters?
